body:
The Election is next Tuesday! Join us for TWO exciting, back-to-back Mega Yacht campaign rallies! | | | | [ ](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=a63dc65617&e=a39a40cba9)
---
| | | **LET'S GO YACHTING!** Peter, our campaign volunteers have been hard at work for the past few months, canvassing thousands of houses in the 37th District, making thousands of phone calls, and sending thousands of text messages.

We also have the most EPIC rallies planned!
---
| [ ](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=17194cb74d&e=a39a40cba9)
---
**NEWPORT TRUMPTILLA VIP MEGA YACHT PARTY!** Join hundreds of MAGA patriots on the water this Sunday in Newport Harbor for the last Trumptilla before the Election! I'm hosting a Yacht Party on the BIGGEST yacht in the Trumptilla! Tickets sold out last Wednesday in under 48 hours! Now we got an even bigger yacht! We have about 20 tickets left!
| [GET YOUR TICKETS NOW!](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=9f1338abbf&e=a39a40cba9 "GET YOUR TICKETS NOW!")

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. subject: Jerry Ortiz y Pino
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
[](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75ae0e/43d8135f/64358d43/510667a5/2682817586/VEsH/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://martinheinrich.com/")
---
Hi there, As I've worked to help New Mexico weather this pandemic and its economic impacts, it's been critical to be able to work alongside strong state and local leaders. And that's exactly why I'm emailing you today. We need to elect effective leaders who will fight for you at all levels of government. **To that end, I am proud to endorse Jerry Ortiz y Pino for State Senate, District 12.** [](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75ae0e/43d8135f/64358d43/510667a4/2682817586/VEsE/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://www.facebook.com/JerryOrtizyPinoforSenate") Jerry works hard for his community and for our state. He is a strong supporter of our children and leads efforts to give them the childhood and future they deserve. He is also a critical voice in our legislature on health care, always making sure that we continue to improve access to affordable and quality health care. I know Jerry and I know he is committed to improving the quality of life for all New Mexicans. **Join me in sending Jerry to the State Senate to continue his good work.** I'm honored to serve as your United States Senator, and I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy. Thank you, Martin Heinrich
---
| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Will Keep Houston Safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Here in Houston we benefit every day from the service and sacrifice of our law
enforcement officers, and under the right leadership, we can improve our police
departments and build a safer future for our city. Unfortunately, over the past
few months we have witnessed an unprecedented politicization of law enforcement
with growing calls to defund and abolish our police departments. And a clear
line is emerging between leaders sowing conflict and discord, and those working
to thoughtfully resolve the challenges facing our officers and our communities.

With his track record of service, Wesley Hunt is the only candidate on the
ballot in the 7th District who can effectively reform our police departments
and simultaneously give our officers the support they need to keep our city
safe.

As a combat veteran, Wesley understands what it means to risk your life for
the safety of your community; he is uniquely positioned to give credence to the
complex challenges our law enforcement face and simultaneously work to
eradicate police brutality across our country.

Unfortunately, Representative Lizzie Fletcher has failed to lead on this
issue, and has instead furthered the division negatively impacting our country.
Over the summer, Fletcher supported Nancy Pelosi as she made a political stunt
of police reform and supported a hyper-partisan police reform bill that makes
it harder for law enforcement to safely do their jobs. And then, when Governor
Greg Abbott put forward a pledge for all elected officials in Texas to sign
that Backs the Blue and opposes the Defund the Police Movement, Fletcher
refused.

But, while Fletcher has proven incapable of putting the needs of her
constituents ahead of her political priorities, Wesley has presented achievable
reforms that will benefit our officers and our communities. A few of Wesley's
recommendations include improving de-escalation training, enhancing reporting
on no-knock warrants, increasing transparency when officers use force, and
incentivizing departments to use body cameras. Wesley Hunt is the candidate who
will unify our city and bring constructive reform to our law enforcement.

Houston needs a Representative who will provide balanced leadership, take the
vitriol out of the conversation, and do what is best for our city. The choice
in the 7th District is clear: on one hand you have Representative Fletcher who
has played politics with police reform and refused to stand by the men and
women who sacrifice to keep our city safe. And on the other hand, you have
Wesley Hunt, who has put forward pragmatic solutions for our city and, in so
doing, earned the support of community leaders and law enforcement alike.

We can either allow incendiary rhetoric to tear apart the fabric of our
Nation, or we can join together and restore trust to our communities.

Wesley Hunt is the only candidate capable of building the unity and stability
needed to move our community forward.

Thank you,
Team Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=3f3dcd6f63af4b35b1b02def4416e512&_t=fQ6hVbo-aQzT_fp-1ekIjdDym6-K08555zBP2FzXF6TGakE7tlphFsXgfXEliD4HAFAMI4VA4H2uYd9uDfh4xjD2kXVdvt5C2hbT2e9tpo_2jpMxhZg_dbmTmpo1WVBtdgdX7ZaNb18KAm66krW0QSrFva7uMfyKRgyKev6kqLA%3D>
.

name: Doug Collins
subject: Kelly Loeffler & the Chinese Communist Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE,
body:
Kelly Loeffler & the Chinese Communist Party

Peter,

What I'm about to show to you
sounds absolutely ridiculous...

It's almost hard to believe that
a sitting Senator from Georgia -- or any state -- would pay such
shocking tributes to the Chinese Communist Party and its
bloodthirsty founder, Mao Tse-Tung.

But then again, this isn't the
first time Kelly Loeffler has left conservatives scratching their
heads, trying to make sense of her actions.

Our latest ad is just 30-seconds,
but I promise you it packs a punch!

First, let me briefly remind
everyone who Mao Tse-Tung is:

❌ Mao founded the Chinese
Communist Party
❌ Mao's brutal socialist
policies -- like the Great Leap Forward -- collectivized China's
agriculture and led to the worst famine in human history
❌ Mao also enacted a widespread
system of forced labor camps -- similar to the Soviet gulag --
killing millions

Altogether, Mao is responsible
for an estimated 65 MILLION deaths, more than Adolf Hitler and
Joseph Stalin; and yet, inexplicably, Kelly Loeffler once
prominently displayed a $60,000 portrait of Mao in her Buckhead
mansion.

When confronted about her
disgusting display of the most barbaric mass murderer of the 20th
century, clearly caught off-guard, Kelly stammered for a few
moments before dodging the question entirely.

When journalists followed up with
her campaign for a comment, her team had the GALL to claim the
image was photoshopped!

She LIED and we have the evidence
to prove it...

As an isolated event, this is
downright disturbing...

But when you begin to take into
account all of Kelly's other tributes to the Chinese Communist
Party, it becomes a much, much darker story.

Kelly and her husband also
brazenly chose to PLANT A CHINESE FLAG at their New York Stock
Exchange!

<

And despite all of Kelly's
political posturing and repeated calls to "hold China
accountable" for its role in the spread of the coronavirus, she
REFUSES to delist the Chinese Communist Party owned companies
that are currently being traded on her exchange.

We CANNOT let unsuspecting
Georgians support someone with such an affinity for a brutal
dictator, tyrannical political party, and poisonous ideology.

Kelly Loeffler not only props up
the Chinese Communist Party, she accepts their money AND pays
homage to their founder with a portrait in HER HOME!

We need EVERY Georgia
conservative to share this video FAR & WIDE!

And if you can, please donate to
help us keep this ad on the air from now through Election Day:
http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250905:J1CiaqboN:m:3:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r

Georgians deserve to know the
truth about Kelly Loeffler.

Will you help us get the truth
out?

Thank you,

Doug Collins

PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE,
INC.

Please take a minute to read the special
message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep
our news service free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

body:
Kamala Harris is coming to Houston on Friday! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b10a8d995cbf/join-crenshaw-hunt-for-a-rally-to-support-texas-energy?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | | | **STAND UP FOR TEXAS ENERGY
RALLY**

with

_**Congressman Dan Crenshaw
Congressional Candidate Wesley Hunt**_

**Friday, October 30, 2020
3:00pm - 5:00pm**

**Lime Instruments**
1187 Brittmore Rd
Houston, TX 77043
Kamala Harris is coming to Houston on Friday! So we're hosting a rally with Texas oil & gas industry workers whose jobs will be destroyed by Kamala's Green New Deal policies. Come out and support these workers, grab some good BBQ, and help us show Kamala that her radical agenda is not welcome in Texas. And don't forget to vote early!
---
|
---
| Please consider your health prior to attending the event, and for your own and others’ safety do not attend if you exhibit any of these symptoms (and you will be given entry to an alternative future event): Fever or chills, Cough, Shortness of breath or difficulty breathing, Fatigue, Muscle or body aches, Headache, New loss of taste or smell, Sore throat, Congestion or runny nose, Nausea or vomiting or Diarrhea.
This event is using reasonable precautions including providing face masks and hand sanitizer, and encouraging social distancing. It is important to note, however, that any group gathering now has inherent COVID transmission risks and by attending this block walk you and any guests are expressly assuming such risks and agree not to hold Crenshaw for Congress liable for any illness or injury.

By attending/participating this event, you are acknowledging that any group gathering now has inherent COVID transmission risks. By attending this event you and any guests are expressly and voluntarily assuming such risks and agree not to hold Crenshaw for Congress liable for any illness or injury.

---

You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=abace1862e).

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?refcode=103020AM)
| | Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw our last email. We are working hard to get even more candidates across the finish line next week and expand our majority - Rochester is one of the places we're hoping to do that. There is a lot on the line with Trump's visit today. If you can, we would really appreciate your grassroots support so we can reject Trump's divisive message and build on the momentum we're already seeing in Rochester. [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?refcode=103020AM) Thank you for your continued support. 5 more days to go! Thank you, Ryan Winkler Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?refcode=103020AM) \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: House DFL Team <house@dflhouse.com> Date: Fri, Oct 29, 2020 at 7:06 PM Subject: Trump in Rochester Friend, Donald Trump is making a stop in Minnesota this week in a last minute attempt to turn Minnesota red. This time, Trump is visiting Rochester: the sight of a competitive Congressional race, a competitive state Senate race, and a pickup opportunity for our race to protect and expand the House DFL Majority. **This is not an accident.** Minnesota Republicans know how important this area is to the fate of our state and country and they will not let up until Election Day - we can't either. We are working very hard to turn Rochester completely blue next week and this presidential visit could potentially throw a wrench in those plans. Will you contribute to our race today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=103020AM) _ _ [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=103020AM) _ _ [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=103020AM) _ _ [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=103020AM) _ _ [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=103020AM) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Strong House DFL races are the base for Democratic victories up and down the ballot. **Your donation today will help us counter the president 's divisive message we know he will continue to spread tomorrow. **Together, we will reject Trump's divisive politics and build a better future for all Minnesotans. Thank you, House DFL Team P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gcRuwyvddUrVGjq9SWuq6NRKqT6m96OXjJfpzKdwvSM=/n_AyKZy5fV8yVTHwGLBlC2EuaPtyZqjUdZz3zdTGtxE=?refcode=103020AM)

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Fulton voters: Today is your last chance to vote at State Farm Arena!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa496/34a064cc/1a6813b2/7023607/4073581673/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - TODAY is the last day of in-person early voting in Georgia, AND it's your last chance to vote at State Farm Arena for this election. Haven't voted? Find an early voting location and hours at [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa496/34a064cc/1a6813b2/7023604/4073581673/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") and make your voice heard today! For Fulton County voters, State Farm Arena is a convenient (and fun) choice. The Atlanta Hawks have opened State Farm Arena as an early voting site with free parking, easy MARTA access, and more than 300 machines to serve voters. Thousands of voters have gone to State Farm Arena, with most waiting 15 minutes or less to cast their ballot. State Farm Arena hours for Friday, October 30 are 7:00am to 7:00pm.
Address: 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA 30303. For directions, free parking, MARTA information and more, visit [statefarmarena.com/plan-your-visit/parking-transportation-voting](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa496/34a064cc/1a6813b2/7023605/4073581673/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.statefarmarena.com/plan-your-visit/parking-transportation-voting"). Thanks for being a Georgia voter! In solidarity,
-Stacey P.S. Not a Fulton County voter, or want information about additional Fulton County early voting locations? Go to [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa496/34a064cc/1a6813b2/7023604/4073581673/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") for information. Did you request a ballot? Fill it out and return it right away. Find a drop box in your county or other return options at [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa496/34a064cc/1a6813b2/7023604/4073581673/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/"). Questions? Call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). |
---|---|---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Last Day to Vote Early! 🗳
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,

After more than two weeks, the end of Early Voting is here. Today is the last day to [](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=f5c4be7465&e=68aaeb0998)vote early! If you haven't voted yet, [please click here to find where you can vote today.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=15f62e86e6&e=68aaeb0998)

I want to thank everybody who has come out to vote, shown their support, and volunteered to wave signs and greet voters at the polls.

Election Day crowds are expected to be large and the lines long, so if you can vote today, please try to do so!

I've had a great time meeting so many of you at the polls over the last two weeks, and [I hope to see many more of you tomorrow!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=f94059a649&e=68aaeb0998)
---
| Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Peter, After more than two weeks, the end of Early Voting is here. Today is the last day to early! If you haven't voted yet, I want to thank everybody who has come out to vote, shown their support, and volunteered to wave signs and greet voters at the polls. Election Day crowds are expected to be large and the lines long, so if you can vote today, please try to do so! I've had a great time meeting so many of you at the polls over the last two weeks, and | Thank you and God bless, | | Genevieve Collins Republican Nominee Texas Congressional District 32 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC | | Copyright © 2020 COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC., All rights reserved.

name: Matt's iPhone
subject: Before the weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
I will keep this brief...
There is very little time left before Election Day. The Democrats are surging in the exit polls, but I have faith we will get out the vote on November 3rd. We have the opportunity to keep Florida red, but we can't do it without the help of great patriots like you.
We are entering the final weekend before Election Day, and we need your support to reach as many voters as possible. Can we count on you to rush in today?
Here's the link to contribute: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-before-the-weekend-1030](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_8akxv6fTjdI4brWMfjkc6qYE4aIvM07_wk1hw9g8YKqF1K6AwavCry_afvMVtFoRYpUhsMash4m8ZkMqungkDp7EhildIqemHjC6OYnIKr8Ei1qMCLPgEGrBULb01lYB47tjcSqVucZEV0FCXNQiA2CzqZmv0lLvAlw-mOuxwPWAISGgcYfh_tHg3C99Hcj&c=RKb1oWD8qNW4Jy1OL0LjzQAGK6a2YNz5efkBsXek7Ny-PxLU5V2itg==&ch=yhyx7mC2yMpiP1QOjdGdPkJaFNYXjE5qSw33q0QZKes7MnafQNLirA==)
Thanks for your continued support!
For Florida, Matt Gaetz
Sent from my iPhone. Please excuse brevity and typos

name: Betsy Rader
subject: We're running on fumes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Biden is up 5 points in Ohio and Republicans know we're winning this State Senate race too - in case you hadn't heard, the recent Ohio campaign finance filings show that ** of all the state races in Ohio, the Republicans spent the most on my race --over half a million dollars. And mainly on attack ads.** Meanwhile, my race is funded by grassroots donors like you. And with election day just a few days away, we're running on fumes and have to meet our goal by tomorrow evening to stay up on tv through the end like my opponent. **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/WeXFs0W8L10PM6LGyD_3ZaDbiw6dtU2LI-S08nvVI5E=?refcode=10.30)** We can show them that you don't need corporate PACs to run a competitive race. Support can and should come from the people. But I'll need your help to make it across the finish line now.[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/WeXFs0W8L10PM6LGyD_3ZaDbiw6dtU2LI-S08nvVI5E=?refcode=10.30&amount=15)**[If you can, please chip in $15 today, or whatever you can, to help us stay up on tv to and try to keep pace with the other side's funding.](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/WeXFs0W8L10PM6LGyD_3ZaDbiw6dtU2LI-S08nvVI5E=?refcode=10.30&amount=15)**[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/WeXFs0W8L10PM6LGyD_3ZaDbiw6dtU2LI-S08nvVI5E=?refcode=10.30&amount=15)Thanks so much for your support. We only have a few more days and we don't want to have any regrets when we wake up on November 4! Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/brKwoZEetplabAVeQigG82JC2-GRr4ObvomlX5AUB9c=?refcode=10.30&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/brKwoZEetplabAVeQigG82JC2-GRr4ObvomlX5AUB9c=?refcode=10.30&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/brKwoZEetplabAVeQigG82JC2-GRr4ObvomlX5AUB9c=?refcode=10.30&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/brKwoZEetplabAVeQigG82JC2-GRr4ObvomlX5AUB9c=?refcode=10.30&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/brKwoZEetplabAVeQigG82JC2-GRr4ObvomlX5AUB9c=?refcode=10.30) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/AhBN6YcM76x19VLPo6F9eQmZh6uK7yY-KZyZCf5EuYs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/fhgH6IIFUxyHAAB9P3yFkkGFo2d67fh9qzb7TUMm0UQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/LavfRlPp_59MBjz6QhxQ1vILLei9zQudXcEytw-j7C0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tPi17e8Vllh4QErMZr3K0oVz648Ek5PGv3n7PHpNimY=/5qVSvQwtomJgYD3L2NSteFq_sBMCsKN-O-zRlE9LliM=)

|
---
| | Hi Peter!

Did you see Mike’s email from Tuesday?

The election is just _4 days_ away! Have you voted already? [**_If not, here’s some helpful information to help you vote early, via ballot drop, or in person on Election Day →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20978398/259084427/-1715181596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZlYjcxMi1jYjFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_-DAJ2oyCA1VLzGo8_8vxpEF3DeEXEXABy-v4p_1G8=&emci=15c14ec0-2d1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=4ffeb712-cb1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)
**[Voting Information](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20978401/259084430/-1715181596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZlYjcxMi1jYjFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_-DAJ2oyCA1VLzGo8_8vxpEF3DeEXEXABy-v4p_1G8=&emci=15c14ec0-2d1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=4ffeb712-cb1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)**
If you have voted already, thank you! Now, will you help us Get Out The Vote by reminding your friends, family, and neighbors?

Thanks for making your voice heard in this crucial election!

— Team Thompson

**_\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---_**

Peter,

I know I’ve said this before but I’ll say it again: **_This is the most important election of our lifetime._**

We’re only _one week_ away from Election Day and it’s all on the line. Ballots have dropped all across California and voters are already casting their ballots. **We need everyone to show up and vote in this election.**

**That’s why I’m emailing you to make sure you have everything you need to cast your ballot!** [**_Click here to find up-to-date information about early voting, locate your polling location, or prepare to vote by mail →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20978404/259084434/-1715181596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZlYjcxMi1jYjFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_-DAJ2oyCA1VLzGo8_8vxpEF3DeEXEXABy-v4p_1G8=&emci=15c14ec0-2d1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=4ffeb712-cb1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)
**[VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20978408/259084437/-1715181596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZlYjcxMi1jYjFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_-DAJ2oyCA1VLzGo8_8vxpEF3DeEXEXABy-v4p_1G8=&emci=15c14ec0-2d1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=4ffeb712-cb1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)**
This is our chance to make our voices heard at the ballot box and to elect Democrats up and down the ticket. But we need everyone to show up to make this happen.

So let’s go out and vote — and then let’s tell our friends, family, and neighbors to do the same.

[**_Click here to find all the information you need to cast your ballot!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20978412/259084469/-1715181596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZlYjcxMi1jYjFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_-DAJ2oyCA1VLzGo8_8vxpEF3DeEXEXABy-v4p_1G8=&emci=15c14ec0-2d1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=4ffeb712-cb1a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)

Thanks for making your voice heard in this crucial election,

Mike

clean_body: I hoped I could set the record straight... | == Friend, I was just on Fox News defending President Trump against the mainstream media and big tech's bias, censorship, and radical agenda. I know you're just as sick of the blatant lies they're telling about our great President as I am, so I thought I could reach out to you for help right now. Election day is just days away, and I need your urgent support to keep our momentum going in Florida all the way until the last ballot is turned in on November 3rd. == == I'm not just running my own Congressional race, Friend - I'm running to help mobilize my Florida district to re-elect President Trump. With the Liberal powerhouses of the mainstream media and big tech working against us, the President is leaning on every district in the Sunshine State to do their part. I'm proud to be one of the allies he believes in to keep Florida red, but I can't do this job alone. Securing our must-win state depends on all of us stepping up to the plate, and I hope we've helped inspire you to join our fight. == Thank you, == Rep. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Planned Parenthood’s outrageous demand
body:
Dear Friend, The days pro-lifers around America have feared are finally upon us. **Planned Parenthood is now asking Judge Orrick to enter judgment against David Daleiden ordering him to pay nearly $15 million of Planned Parenthood 's attorney's fees without showing ANY contemporaneous, detailed timesheets to support this outrageous request.** You may recall David is the undercover citizen journalist who exposed Planned Parenthood's evil scheme to sell baby body parts for profit. Now, he needs your help. **[That's why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more to the David Daleiden Defense Fund to help us turn back this ridiculous demand from Planned Parenthood.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==)** You see, Planned Parenthood is trying to browbeat David Daleiden into submission by forcing us to defend against the request for multi-millions of attorney's fees while we're busily, urgently preparing our appeal of David's case. The abortion industry is determined to squash all resistance and they're especially afraid of David since he spent 30 months undercover taking videos of abortion workers admitting to selling aborted baby body parts. They're willing to do whatever it takes to hide the evidence from public view and accountability. _**Even if it means bending the law.**_ We need your help to defeat this almost unheard-of demand for legal fees so we can focus on litigating David's appeal. [**I 'm asking you to keep us in the fight with an emergency donation of $35 or more today so that we can stand up to Planned Parenthood and keep David Daleiden free.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==) Unfortunately, our enemies have cash to burn and friends in high places. Which means more resources for them to use tying up David and his pro-life co-defendants in such expensive, drawn-out battles over their own legal fees that young David could not even remotely afford to pay. Make no mistake about it, the abortion lobby's goals are to bankrupt David and distract his lawyers by filing outrageous civil lawsuits and phony claims, then dragging them out as long as possible... **[...which is why I urgently need your help to fight back with a donation of $35 or more right away.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==)** On top of all of the civil lawsuits, we are still defending David against nine bogus felony counts. We're also moving to dismiss the prosecution's tardy effort to add a 10th felony charge barred by the statute of limitations. **When David first exposed Planned Parenthood 's evil scheme, Planned Parenthood went to then-California Attorney General Kamala Harris, who ordered a raid on David's tiny one-bedroom apartment in order to trump up these false charges.**
You see, if David has to face another jury trial on just two or more felony charges, we're still in real danger of jurors delivering Solomonic-type justice -- a "split verdict" -- that would result in David spending hard time in prison. Why? Because this young man had the courage to lead an undercover investigation that captured video evidence of the abortion goliath conspiring to illegally harvest and sell aborted baby body parts. Now, unless we can persuade the California Supreme Court to overturn the lower court findings there was "probable cause" to bring these charges, we're going to need to put on an over-the-top defense to make sure jurors are not pressure to "compromise" and convict David of even one of the charges. So if you agree it's absolutely outrageous that David is the one facing criminal charges and hard time in a state penitentiary -- rather than Planned Parenthood's executives... **AND NOW Planned Parenthood demanding the ridiculous sum of nearly $15 million with no proof ...** **[...then I pray you'll make an emergency donation to help us defend David and other pro-life heroes today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==)** My friend, the reality is... _**You couldn't be there**_ when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry -- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... The chilling words of one Planned Parenthood executive -- "I want a Lamborghini." -- are difficult to forget. _**You couldn't be there**_ as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great care and precision to preserve their organs for maximum profit. _**You couldn't be there**_ when the videos were released and Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood and their allies conspired to crush David with trumped up felony charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And **_you couldn't be there_** with David when he appeared in both Texas (whose criminal charges, brought by the Houston District's Attorney General, we defeated three years ago) and California for booking and processing -- fingerprinted and photographed for mug-shots like a common criminal. (But our criminal defense team was there!) **[That's why I'm prayerfully asking you to consider making a special gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to help us drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality (even including infanticide!) into the light.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the **Thomas More Society** \-- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's civil and criminal defense. The **Thomas More Society** is proud to defend many of the most renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement -- because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially and personally destroy our clients -- _**we fight back**_. And I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. And he never will do so! **In fact, David is now renewing the f ocus on Planned Parenthood's criminal, illegal, and unethical misbehavior with a new lawsuit!** As I mentioned earlier, we've filed a federal civil rights lawsuit for David in Los Angeles, that takes former California Attorney General and now Vice-Presidential candidate Kamala Harris and incumbent CA AG Xavier Becerra to task and calls them to account for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law in an unprecedented persecution of a citizen journalist because of his disfavored political views. And we're also suing Planned Parenthood in federal court in New York City (site of its international headquarters) for falsely defaming David's journalistic credentials by calling his videotapes "false" in public while admitting in court they are true! This offensive tactics are a key part of our defense, as we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without these counterattacks. **[Will you help us defend David and put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood and their allies on their heels with an urgent donation of $35 or more today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==)** My friend, David set out to expose the evils of Planned Parenthood -- and that's what you and I can make sure he continues doing by winning this legal battle. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6,000,000. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** **In addition to the criminal case and our new federal lawsuits, we 're currently defending David in THREE other cases.**
* In the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood.

* Meanwhile, the judge in the other separate civil lawsuit brought against David by the National Abortion Federation continues to refuse to lift the preliminary "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business.

* And in the civil lawsuit filed by anonymous Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court up in Seattle, after we achieved victory for a second time on appeal after the lower court judge suppressed David's right to review public records of taxpayer-funded transactions involving abortionists' sales of aborted babies' body parts to middle-man brokers for resale to research laboratories around the U.S., that same lower court judge boldly re-entered essentially the same truth-suppressing decree that we had twice managed to overturn on appeal. As a result, we've had to file yet another appeal -- our third time in quest of true justice on appeal -- so that David can see and tell the world about the evil fruits of this gross and grisly misuse of taxpayers' dollars!

But Planned Parenthood has millions of dollars to spend on lawyers and lobbyists -- and they'll stop at nothing to silence David and prevent the truth from coming out. That's why we urgently need your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will use this link to make an emergency contribution of $35 to the DAVID DALEIDEN CRIMINAL DEFENSE FUND.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==)** This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle - with Planned Parenthood, the National Abortion Federation, the Attorney General of California, and their allies all arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unprosecuted and unpunished.** But by clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important life-saving work. **[So please make your emergency contribution of $35 or more today and join the battle against Planned Parenthood.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==)** I know David will be deeply touched and encouraged by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in prison rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. **You and I cannot let that happen.** Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden against the felony charges brought by the State of California? [**Please make your emergency contribution of $35 or more to stop this attempt to crush David Daleiden and all our other heroic pro-life clients.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==) [**Donate Now**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FiXkUA7q8tLoX9eGE4hJSThoQpThWqM9lkb21R6YdhJBe2LDbAk4Xq4ff0zew4vbYJeIp55_SP5h2zSri8LsfKOnccYbkdl7PXyPoS1aW4Igr85CESVqQQ8beGDkfGHIMAbjPfT8LixDZEyCP-CZ2fB9oQk1Sw9YBlDSOwep3AkEl8B_M-F8DU-Uwz9B3LKkA5ZU8NdK4rY=&c=bHEbEpElBQb9Z0kQ4iEAJKQF00ZYj7OtUttSfqG-AWfHbJL3-9Fw4g==&ch=DRzzYn95s15FrgHkFxG8RxqEW4dCUFD_MZ4RGg3PLgM_edbENrnIFw==) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. We'd hate to have to cut our budget in key states.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019ICySth4ZK_gCYHGPYDZMsyx37GM-lRKnHfa_3A2xNeZHw_nPlpFCaG5mGkc8WavPnh4MzVdMWfekI-i-eWa2QPoeQ6MIrjuVBhRQ4fEKk215HBy81FWJvV8LlrdKusE5BrHALZ_T64rwmcANqm8eNnuFUyEf338Xo__5PyoZ-_xAY1ah6hG9mmQi6n4xL1DIZ3vO6tylPXfl6Fc--MlzzHBtusmBHz-DPgGBNBqJpXrSwaLmAnNx7Kg_bR99XdZ82i4FZ2GP2CRYoqXWngJxwpSQUEkBHQ4dCxRoSECEVY=&c=6Na5yzxNHYM1eQ91-fNSuRQT6Y7PH4ScYpZtANbkudPYva7Z0aWqJA==&ch=oD_HN8lRNREwCZ0UePhxaUgMpO4WItl6stYoigrM2IwMBWBwPiNZTg==)

Friend,
---
I am so thrilled to be fighting to elect a historic slate of diverse congressional pro-life candidates to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi's control.
---
But we're approaching the final end-of-month deadline of the election -- when we will need to make some of our final payments for ad buys.
---
**As of now, we don 't have enough funds to run ads in every battleground state, which means we'll have to make tough choices about where to place money.**
---
_And with headlines like this one below, I don 't want to have to make budget cuts ANYWHERE, so I'm asking for your urgent support before the end-of-month deadline:_
---
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019ICySth4ZK_gCYHGPYDZMsyx37GM-lRKnHfa_3A2xNeZHw_nPlpFCaG5mGkc8WavPnh4MzVdMWfekI-i-eWa2QPoeQ6MIrjuVBhRQ4fEKk215HBy81FWJvV8LlrdKusE5BrHALZ_T64rwmcANqm8eNnuFUyEf338Xo__5PyoZ-_xAY1ah6hG9mmQi6n4xL1DIZ3vO6tylPXfl6Fc--MlzzHBtusmBHz-DPgGBNBqJpXrSwaLmAnNx7Kg_bR99XdZ82i4FZ2GP2CRYoqXWngJxwpSQUEkBHQ4dCxRoSECEVY=&c=6Na5yzxNHYM1eQ91-fNSuRQT6Y7PH4ScYpZtANbkudPYva7Z0aWqJA==&ch=oD_HN8lRNREwCZ0UePhxaUgMpO4WItl6stYoigrM2IwMBWBwPiNZTg==)

Nancy Pelosi has REJECTED Rep. Steve Scalise's petition over 80 times to hold a floor vote in the House to protect babies born alive after undergoing botched abortions.
---
_**In just a couple of days, we have the chance to put an end to Pelosi 's radically pro-abortion House majority that has condemned born-alive infants to death over 80 times.**_
---
But to do so, we absolutely must hit our end-of-month fundraising goal or else we will need to begin pulling support from key states.
---
_Pulling resources at a time when Biden and Kamala are INCREASING their spend in battleground states would be devastating._
---
Ever since we put Judge Amy Coney Barrett on the Supreme Court, left-wing donors have been giving the Biden-Harris campaign millions because they trust them to pack the Supreme Court with a _tenth_ justice and undo every pro-life accomplishment.
---
As I've said time and time again, this election isn't merely about politics. It is a matter of life or death.
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to ensure we can submit the payment for our final ad-buys in time to elect pro-life leaders to the House.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019ICySth4ZK_gCYHGPYDZMsyx37GM-lRKnHfa_3A2xNeZHw_nPlpFCaG5mGkc8WavPnh4MzVdMWfekI-i-eWa2QPoeQ6MIrjuVBhRQ4fEKk215HBy81FWJvV8LlrdKusE5BrHALZ_T64rwmcANqm8eNnuFUyEf338Xo__5PyoZ-_xAY1ah6hG9mmQi6n4xL1DIZ3vO6tylPXfl6Fc--MlzzHBtusmBHz-DPgGBNBqJpXrSwaLmAnNx7Kg_bR99XdZ82i4FZ2GP2CRYoqXWngJxwpSQUEkBHQ4dCxRoSECEVY=&c=6Na5yzxNHYM1eQ91-fNSuRQT6Y7PH4ScYpZtANbkudPYva7Z0aWqJA==&ch=oD_HN8lRNREwCZ0UePhxaUgMpO4WItl6stYoigrM2IwMBWBwPiNZTg==)

Thank you and God bless,

Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC's spending is independent; it does not make contributions to, or coordinate its spending with, any candidates or political parties. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. The IRS does not allow contributions to WSO PAC to be deducted as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Believe it or not, we’re winning
body:
When I threw my hat in the ring over a year ago, this race looked like a longshot. The goal was to give my Republican opponent a run for his money. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/227a0844a8be/believe-it-or-not-were-winning?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
When I threw my hat in the ring over a year ago, this race looked like a longshot. The goal was to give my Republican opponent a run for his money. But every day, this race has looked more and more competitive. **And now we have a good shot at winning.** The early voting data is looking better by the day and our army of volunteers is working as hard as ever.

[Click here to invest in our grassroots campaign to keep the momentum going!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6c1ac03938&e=140a9b81e7)

Every single day, I am talking to Republican voters who are voting for Democrats like me for the first time in their lives. They are tired of having a Congressman who puts his corporate donors above the needs of the people of this district. They feel that the Republican Party has abandoned them - and they are right.

In an under-the-radar race like this, every dollar counts. My opponent is bankrolled by super PACs, corporate special interest groups, and the national Republican Party. **But I have refused their dirty money so I will be beholden to no one but my constituents - unlike my opponent.
**
I need your help. [Can I count on you to chip in and help us flip the Illinois 16th from red to blue?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=cbb3ca6343&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

body:
Millions of ballots have already been cast in this election and as I type this message, Democrats are flooding battleground states with ads targeting undecided voters.
Friend,

We are out of time.

Millions of ballots have already been cast in this election and as I type this message, Democrats are flooding battleground states with ads targeting undecided voters.

I know you've been getting a bunch of emails, but we aren't exaggerating. **The GOP Senate Majority is in serious danger.**

[**I hope you will give one more time to help us hold off the Democrats and win in November.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FyJJoYf6ftBSvpzXSniI9g-Bni961Uz-6r9OVMH8y6GH85Bl4ndOX--eayFGuA6WNYoF-TBxa4Pacw0tC3Qd8QaerfoDBIc3hCNnmtqr_qvIchDpaYQhbQR62JcEga1FjdCbbX-3_BCs7Ltfv7hj9j-s1UyRtZ_nJQ_f3XuMjQ8MSEROmKd53xXzwlFmeb7o05fHnO1987-9J6scEGmSug1s_lB8PkJSM_2Zr63MTxe3cNGc7a0zGWdSx3Oji_kEAXBwadISWCtm4vC5gC2nXGzWKq4BhClSp59Wyaa-GfB7rK2VoFW7BSr8oXwm2PnJL6GLSQ1EN4N6vGu6J3LCT9fD7vpN7CEswO9PyfDct2sGkgejhQLbNVdN5g7gzyHqe8jOtY2tRhZtLpPOQlN5_zj-wEdQWMri&c=Q4FGQlFPl4o8YweutBx-WSGU48JC7F8jYiNMXdnNc2ayXt3I5bd5gA==&ch=HTeiNTdKT6aR0eebazq60GsXcQ9QczhKuWA46kTXmOLdXnwCG27fEg==)

[**I will be grateful for ANY AMOUNT you can give.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FyJJoYf6ftBSvpzXSniI9g-Bni961Uz-6r9OVMH8y6GH85Bl4ndOX--eayFGuA6WNYoF-TBxa4Pacw0tC3Qd8QaerfoDBIc3hCNnmtqr_qvIchDpaYQhbQR62JcEga1FjdCbbX-3_BCs7Ltfv7hj9j-s1UyRtZ_nJQ_f3XuMjQ8MSEROmKd53xXzwlFmeb7o05fHnO1987-9J6scEGmSug1s_lB8PkJSM_2Zr63MTxe3cNGc7a0zGWdSx3Oji_kEAXBwadISWCtm4vC5gC2nXGzWKq4BhClSp59Wyaa-GfB7rK2VoFW7BSr8oXwm2PnJL6GLSQ1EN4N6vGu6J3LCT9fD7vpN7CEswO9PyfDct2sGkgejhQLbNVdN5g7gzyHqe8jOtY2tRhZtLpPOQlN5_zj-wEdQWMri&c=Q4FGQlFPl4o8YweutBx-WSGU48JC7F8jYiNMXdnNc2ayXt3I5bd5gA==&ch=HTeiNTdKT6aR0eebazq60GsXcQ9QczhKuWA46kTXmOLdXnwCG27fEg==)

I grew up in a single parent household, where we had to stretch every dollar. I know that each and every donation made is a sacrifice and I am grateful.

We cannot allow Chuck Schumer to take over the Senate--he will completely silence our conservative voices.

-Tim

name: Mary Mancini
subject: ELECTION DAY: If You See Something, Say Something
body:
If you have already voted early or by absentee ballot, THANK YOU! If not, you have the opportunity to cast your vote next Tuesday, November 3rd, for Tennessee Democrats up and down the ticket - from school board to the state house to President of the United States.
Dear Peter
If you have already voted early or by absentee ballot, THANK YOU! If not, you have the opportunity to cast your vote next Tuesday, November 3rd, for Tennessee Democrats up and down the ticket - from school board to the state house to President of the United States.
**MAKE YOUR PLAN TO VOTE / CHECK YOUR ABSENTEE BALLOT.** Early voting in Tennessee is up 40% compared to 2016, and the momentum must continue through Tuesday. Everyone is voting this year, so join your friends and family and make your plan to go vote. [You can easily locate your Election Day voting location OR track your absentee ballot here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20981529/259097189/-505603136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE0NzNhMS1kMzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CK5py4B57PJ04rP2vzPSOwjJpnKfRCJy77L3HBMvU3k=&emci=a99c945a-c81a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=671473a1-d31a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892).
Here's a short list to help you make your plan to vote:
* What time will you go? In the morning? After lunch? After work?
* How will you get to the polls?
* Who will you bring with you?
* [Click here to find your polling location.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20981530/259097190/179162750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE0NzNhMS1kMzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CK5py4B57PJ04rP2vzPSOwjJpnKfRCJy77L3HBMvU3k=&emci=a99c945a-c81a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=671473a1-d31a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)
* Remember to bring your Photo ID. [The list of accepted IDs is at this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20981531/259097191/-221411079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE0NzNhMS1kMzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CK5py4B57PJ04rP2vzPSOwjJpnKfRCJy77L3HBMvU3k=&emci=a99c945a-c81a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=671473a1-d31a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892).
* [Vote for Democratic candidates up and down the ballot!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20981532/259097192/-2139863518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE0NzNhMS1kMzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CK5py4B57PJ04rP2vzPSOwjJpnKfRCJy77L3HBMvU3k=&emci=a99c945a-c81a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=671473a1-d31a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)
* Save the TNDP voter protection hotline number to your phone: 1-855-486-8386

**VOTER PROTECTION.** This election will have long-standing consequences. Republicans know it and they are using every voter intimidation tool in their toolbox. Reports of voter intimidation during early voting have poured into the TNDP Voter Protection Hotline. From county election commission officials illegally turning away voters wearing "Black Lives Matter" shirts and local Trump supporters circling polling locations with guns and Trump signs in the back of their trucks, Republicans are doing everything they can to intimidate Democratic voters because they know the importance of your vote.
**IF YOU SEE SOMETHING, SAY SOMETHING! **This election will come down to the wire but we absolutely will not sit by and allow intimidation tactics to run unchallenged and undermine the vote. The Tennessee Democratic Party Voter Protection Hotline number is 1-855-4VOTETN (1-855-486-8386).Iif you see anything that concerns you regarding the election, do not hesitate to call. For more information on how to Protect the Vote, email Voter Protection Director Kendra Lee kendra@tndp.org and **[Join us TODAY at 4 PM CT for a Voter Protection Briefing Live on Facebook.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20981533/259097193/-441869451?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE0NzNhMS1kMzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CK5py4B57PJ04rP2vzPSOwjJpnKfRCJy77L3HBMvU3k=&emci=a99c945a-c81a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=671473a1-d31a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20981534/259097194/-1220405130?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22page_admin_bar%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A123394135830%7D%22%7D%2C%7B%22surface%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22\[\]%22%7D\]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE0NzNhMS1kMzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CK5py4B57PJ04rP2vzPSOwjJpnKfRCJy77L3HBMvU3k=&emci=a99c945a-c81a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=671473a1-d31a-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)**THANK YOU for being a voter and THANK YOU for protecting the vote.

See you at the polls,
Mary Mancini, TNDP Chair

If not, you have the opportunity to cast your vote next Tuesday, November 3rd, for Tennessee Democrats up and down the ticket - from school board to the state house to President of the United States. Dear Peter If you have already voted early or by absentee ballot, THANK YOU! If not, you have the opportunity to cast your vote next Tuesday, November 3rd, for Tennessee Democrats up and down the ticket - from school board to the state house to President of the United States. MAKE YOUR PLAN TO VOTE / CHECK YOUR ABSENTEE BALLOT. Early voting in Tennessee is up 40% compared to 2016, and the momentum must continue through Tuesday. Everyone is voting this year, so join your friends and family and make your plan to go vote. . Here's a short list to help you make your plan to vote: What time will you go? In the morning? After lunch? After work? How will you get to the polls? Who will you bring with you? Remember to bring your Photo ID. . Save the TNDP voter protection hotline number to your phone: 1-855-486-8386 VOTER PROTECTION. This election will have long-standing consequences. Republicans know it and they are using every voter intimidation tool in their toolbox. Reports of voter intimidation during early voting have poured into the TNDP Voter Protection Hotline. From county election commission officials illegally turning away voters wearing "Black Lives Matter" shirts and local Trump supporters circling polling locations with guns and Trump signs in the back of their trucks, Republicans are doing everything they can to intimidate Democratic voters because they know the importance of your vote. IF YOU SEE SOMETHING, SAY SOMETHING! This election will come down to the wire but we absolutely will not sit by and allow intimidation tactics to run unchallenged and undermine the vote. The Tennessee Democratic Party Voter Protection Hotline number is 1-855-4VOTETN (1-855-486-8386).Iif you see anything that concerns you regarding the election, do not hesitate to call. name: Andrew Hitt - RPW Chairman
subject: Hack Against President's Campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56740616:WEMqYDKQN:m:1:2068296031:AC5AAAEE2656ED79616F09A08DD068A0:r)

Friend,

You knew it was coming.

It's the eve of the election, President Trump is gaining momentum and Democrats are panicked, so we knew dirty tricks were on deck.

A sophisticated cyber-attack designed to divert resources from the President's campaign targeted Battleground Wisconsin.

_Our operation remains strong, and our volunteers are fired up like never before.
_

**[But now we need your help!
](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56740616:WEMqYDKQN:m:1:2068296031:AC5AAAEE2656ED79616F09A08DD068A0:r) **

With the leading poll in Wisconsin showing President Trump faring better than he was at this point in 2016, the Democrats are in full-blown panic - and dumping massive amounts of money into Wisconsin to turn the tide back in their favor.

The cyber criminals who targeted the President's campaign were surgical in their precision. They clearly want to sway our battleground state to the liberal Biden Harris ticket.

_**At this late hour, every dollar they steal from the President 's campaign is like a dollar in the Democrats' pockets**_**.** With your help we will fight off the Democrat money and the cyber criminals trying to tamper with our election.

**[They won't stop us - but we need your help now more than ever!
](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56740616:WEMqYDKQN:m:1:2068296031:AC5AAAEE2656ED79616F09A08DD068A0:r) **

Please donate right now to help make sure Wisconsin's 10 crucial electoral votes are cast for President Trump.

Andrew Hitt
Chairman
Republican Party of Wisconsin

**Early votes cast are quickly approaching __the total vote for 2016__.**
There are only 36 hours left in early voting. We need to make sure that Texans in the 17th District go vote with all the facts:
**Pete Sessions is a corrupt, power hungry Washington politician.** He’s repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. He’s a diehard partisan who would rather move his house then change his mind — even when voters have already rejected him.
**That’s why we’re working so hard to elect Rick. His priorities are Texas’ priorities like expanding health care access, improving rural broadband access, and getting relief to families who are affected by the sagging economy.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Almost to the Finish Line!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

We are just 4 days away from election day. The moment we have been anticipating and working tirelessly to get to is almost upon us. Audrey and I cannot express how grateful we are for the abundance of support you have given us along this journey. [We are nearly to the finish line!](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=43dbeda60e&e=a9d1410029)

As we prepare for November 3rd, I wanted to reflect back on some of the memories we made along the way.
---
|
---
Tracey with GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in Garden City.
|
---
Tracey with Mary Eisenhower, granddaughter of President Dwight D. Eisenhower, in Hays.
---
Tracey, Congressman Marshall, and state senate candidate Craig Bowser (district 22) with K-State College Republicans.
|
---
Tracey and the team at a snow cone social in Salina.
---
Tracey, Audrey, and the kids on primary election day in August.
| | These memories perfectly capture the extraordinary freedoms we are fortunate enough to have in the United States. I’m more motivated than ever to leave an America for our children and grandchildren that is a more perfect union than we have inherited. **America is on the ballot this election. **

Thank you for your immense support of myself and the mission to keep America great. Now, it is time to take it to the polls.

[**See you at the finish line.**](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=7bd1c20d8a&e=a9d1410029)
---
| Yours in the fight,

Tracey
---
| [DONATE](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=cb76754eb9&e=a9d1410029 "DONATE")
---
| [About Tracey](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=26367b777d&e=a9d1410029 "About Tracey")
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friends, We are just 4 days away from election day. The moment we have been anticipating and working tirelessly to get to is almost upon us. Audrey and I cannot express how grateful we are for the abundance of support you have given us along this journey. As we prepare for November 3rd, I wanted to reflect back on some of the memories we made along the way. | Tracey with GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in Garden City. | Tracey with Mary Eisenhower, granddaughter of President Dwight D. Eisenhower, in Hays. Tracey, Congressman Marshall, and state senate candidate Craig Bowser (district 22) with K-State College Republicans. | Tracey and the team at a snow cone social in Salina. Tracey, Audrey, and the kids on primary election day in August. | | These memories perfectly capture the extraordinary freedoms we are fortunate enough to have in the United States. I’m more motivated than ever to leave an America for our children and grandchildren that is a more perfect union than we have inherited. America is on the ballot this election. Thank you for your immense support of myself and the mission to keep America great. Now, it is time to take it to the polls. | Yours in the fight, Tracey | "DONATE" | "About Tracey" | "How Can I Help?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc. | Our mailing address is: P.O. name: Headquarters, Team Warner
subject: 81% of the way there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark's final end-of-month deadline is 11:59 p.m. on 10/31!
|
---

| | Derek --

The **final** end-of-month deadline for Mark Warner's re-election campaign is 11:59 p.m. on October 31st.

**We're currently at 81% of our $250,000 goal.** Meeting this goal is critical to reaching as many voters as we can in the final days before November 3rd.

[**Can you pitch in a few dollars to get us the rest of the way there?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9ef/53d9897e/556166cc/1c88ca2e/3459526134/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-end-of-month?refcode=20201030_f_2_nd__918__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9ef/53d9897e/556166cc/1c88ca2d/3459526134/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-end-of-month?refcode=20201030_f_2_nd__918__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
Election Day is in just four days, and more than two million Virginians have already voted -- but there's so many more voters to reach. Hitting 100% of our end-of-month goal will mean we can reach more voters with Mark's message and make sure they cast their ballots in this important election.

[**We're so close to reaching this _final_ end-of-month goal, Derek. If you have the means, please help us reach this can't-miss goal!**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9ef/53d9897e/556166cc/1c88ca2c/3459526134/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-end-of-month?refcode=20201030_f_2_nd__918__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9ef/53d9897e/556166cc/1c88ca2b/3459526134/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-end-of-month?refcode=20201030_f_2_nd__918__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: Dean Browning
subject: Pennsylvania Wins It All
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CSSPAC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Have you heard the news from President Donald J. Trump?
He said that if we win Pennsylvania, we will win this Election!!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_rnThA4S3tasz9drhTsHw5mecFP0rraqctlPwAW5T7-IjGKkl0h7KPmV6Z7KAfqaKGVuMcZVHSvYjDncHDAmLZaLD5tCOpYC_BJWDeGZAq6eJi11VFU52skX_agbPk6SX0u2uSeI6iY8Kx0IB4HB75LvKbQcp_k-MA53nMh0pomzVVXmbyFlGqCQUOuCdYFzU_1CQl3amTk=&c=dadIS4r9nliR__IAYntxYq8Sa8JGXvowPZa-Ejlq5PIpLQTUerELLg==&ch=6lK5J5uWLqaXgBqxiM6IAPLpuLRs0GQkVSsgK8KyllAzIqWpz7GDyA==)
---
| President Trump is counting on supporters like you to show up to the polls on Election Day to win this election for Pennsylvania and the entire Country.
Right now, we are in dire need of getting this message out. Will you help support our President by making a contribution of $50, $25, or even just $5 today?
---
| | | [Donate Now!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_rnThA4S3tasz9drhTsHw5mecFP0rraqctlPwAW5T7-IjGKkl0h7KPmV6Z7KAfqaKGVuMcZVHSvYjDncHDAmLZaLD5tCOpYC_BJWDeGZAq6eJi11VFU52skX_agbPk6SX0u2uSeI6iY8Kx0IB4HB75LvKbQcp_k-MA53nMh0pomzVVXmbyFlGqCQUOuCdYFzU_1CQl3amTk=&c=dadIS4r9nliR__IAYntxYq8Sa8JGXvowPZa-Ejlq5PIpLQTUerELLg==&ch=6lK5J5uWLqaXgBqxiM6IAPLpuLRs0GQkVSsgK8KyllAzIqWpz7GDyA==)
---
| We have crunched the numbers and found that for every dollar donated, we can reach one new Trump supporter.
If we can raise just $10,000 in the next few days, we can alter the outcome of the 2020 Presidential Election!
I urge you to donate RIGHT NOW!!
President Trump is serious when he says that winning Pennsylvania alone will help him secure his re-election.
We cannot sit back and be idle while the Radical Left attempts to STEAL THIS ELECTION through fraudulent mail in voting and mass voter suppression.
Everyday Patriots right here in Pennsylvania will decide this election. And we need every single one of them to show up on Tuesday, November 3rd, 2020.
That is why we need you to make a contribution today. Even just $10 will allow us to reach 10 new Trump supporters and hopefully change the direction of this election in Trump's favor.
---
| | | [Donate Now!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_rnThA4S3tasz9drhTsHw5mecFP0rraqctlPwAW5T7-IjGKkl0h7KPmV6Z7KAfqaKGVuMcZVHSvYjDncHDAmLZaLD5tCOpYC_BJWDeGZAq6eJi11VFU52skX_agbPk6SX0u2uSeI6iY8Kx0IB4HB75LvKbQcp_k-MA53nMh0pomzVVXmbyFlGqCQUOuCdYFzU_1CQl3amTk=&c=dadIS4r9nliR__IAYntxYq8Sa8JGXvowPZa-Ejlq5PIpLQTUerELLg==&ch=6lK5J5uWLqaXgBqxiM6IAPLpuLRs0GQkVSsgK8KyllAzIqWpz7GDyA==)
---
| It is our time to rise up and defend the principles of freedom and democracy.
Please, take the extra two minutes to forward this email to your friends and family. It could decide our Country's future.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Chairman Common Sense Solutions, PAC
P.S. - Did you see what President Donald J. Trump had to say about Pennsylvania?
If he can win our home state, he will win this entire election!
Will you make a contribution of $50, $25, or even just $10 so we can reach new Trump supporters in Pennsylvania and alter the outcome of this election!
---
| | | [Donate Now!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_rnThA4S3tasz9drhTsHw5mecFP0rraqctlPwAW5T7-IjGKkl0h7KPmV6Z7KAfqaKGVuMcZVHSvYjDncHDAmLZaLD5tCOpYC_BJWDeGZAq6eJi11VFU52skX_agbPk6SX0u2uSeI6iY8Kx0IB4HB75LvKbQcp_k-MA53nMh0pomzVVXmbyFlGqCQUOuCdYFzU_1CQl3amTk=&c=dadIS4r9nliR__IAYntxYq8Sa8JGXvowPZa-Ejlq5PIpLQTUerELLg==&ch=6lK5J5uWLqaXgBqxiM6IAPLpuLRs0GQkVSsgK8KyllAzIqWpz7GDyA==)

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56724095:WzqabDKNL:m:1:2202880964:A216AE5790B07A099AD7907707E9B787:r)
---
Peter,
---
There have already been 2,000,000 votes cast in Virginia -- but last time, Mark Warner only won by 16,727 votes, so it's up to us to make sure every last conservative gets out to vote.
---
**_Since EVERYTHING depends on what we do in these final moments, I want to ensure we put it all out on the line, with no regrets._**
---
_But right now, we're still a staggering $101,981 behind on our Election Day Fund._
---
With less than a week to go, I'm asking you to make a contribution to sustain our field program until the very last vote is cast.
---
[**Please make a contribution to our Election Day Fund to ensure we have what it takes to DEFEAT Mark Warner in battle on Tuesday.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56724095:WzqabDKNL:m:1:2202880964:A216AE5790B07A099AD7907707E9B787:r)

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Election Eve Virtual Prayer and Worship Night
body:
| | Join us in prayer the night before the election
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2zkTyI4X97qBAs0cigmSK0uDdEkTdoyvirSxYMo7nnidjXkzDcvM_IZ8fT_TPL656U&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201030com01&n=1)
| Peter, Join us for a time of worship and prayer the eve before the election, **[Monday, November 2, 6:30 PM ET / 3:30 PM PT](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2zkTyI4X97qBAs0cigmSK0uDdEkTdoyvirSxYMo7nnidtgnFEWKZ6LUm5q19KKBpO4V0vOoaoSTT6vPYOwOi9YJuNO99QwQDpQrcQsaVc4NfseQGlTjNb-hCC80NAERgp0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201030com01&n=2).** Prayers will be given by Dr. Jack Graham, Rev. Samuel Rodriguez, Kirk Cameron, Mike Huckabee, and Bishop Harry Jackson. We will pray for the preservation and advancement of biblical values in America, and we will pray for the Americans who will cast their vote on Tuesday for our elected and soon-to-be elected leaders. We will be led in worship by The Jordan Family Band, The Nelons, The Sound, Wes Hampton, Marlana Vahoose, Jeff Stice, and more. Our country is at a crossroads. The visions for America could not be more stark and the consequences from the choices made at the ballot box could not be more distinct. **It is time for Christians to lead. We must first lead in worship and prayer and then cast our votes.** It’s why at My Faith Votes, we say, “Pray. Think. Vote.” We must base every decision on prayer. Join us on Monday night. You will be encouraged as you unite with other believers from across the nation. You can participate from your own living room or your church. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2zkTyI4X97qBAs0cigmSK0uDdEkTdoyvirSxYMo7nnidtgnFEWKZ6LUm5q19KKBpO4V0vOoaoSTT6vPYOwOi9YJuNO99QwQDpQrcQsaVc4NfseQGlTjNb-hCC80NAERgp0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201030com01&n=3) Spread the word to your friends and family across the country. Now is the time to worship our faithful God and lift up our prayers and supplications to Him. **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201030com01&n=4)
---

clean_body: | | Join us in prayer the night before the election | Peter, Join us for a time of worship and prayer the eve before the election, . Prayers will be given by Dr. Jack Graham, Rev. Samuel Rodriguez, Kirk Cameron, Mike Huckabee, and Bishop Harry Jackson. We will pray for the preservation and advancement of biblical values in America, and we will pray for the Americans who will cast their vote on Tuesday for our elected and soon-to-be elected leaders. We will be led in worship by The Jordan Family Band, The Nelons, The Sound, Wes Hampton, Marlana Vahoose, Jeff Stice, and more. Our country is at a crossroads. The visions for America could not be more stark and the consequences from the choices made at the ballot box could not be more distinct. It is time for Christians to lead. We must first lead in worship and prayer and then cast our votes. It’s why at My Faith Votes, we say, “Pray. Think. Vote.” We must base every decision on prayer. Join us on Monday night. You will be encouraged as you unite with other believers from across the nation. You can participate from your own living room or your church. Spread the word to your friends and family across the country. Now is the time to worship our faithful God and lift up our prayers and supplications to Him. Pray. Think. Vote. Jason Yates CEO * You subscribed mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below. © 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
