name: John Cornyn
subject: Biggest deadline yet
body:
Friend, This is big. Huge, in fact!
I've emailed you countless times about End of Month deadlines but this one is VERY different.
Not only are we facing our biggest goal of this entire campaign, but when our deadline passes we'll have just TWO DAYS before Election Day.
This. Is. It.
Friend, to be totally transparent with you, we have a goal of more than $2 million this month alone.
It's our biggest goal of the entire campaign by far. And now we have just a few days to hit it.
**[I'm leaning on you very hard here, Friend I budgeted $50 next to your name.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yO6rbw9_HadJqZUZc9Kw6J5UsichnKHsM4VIvAs7naEUP4y7V39HZgKQmecJJCPCohHKFCHVIh_gs-KUAsXheh4cssjl_3EE9jhbUXAq_ubjJWCV_AHaOWLZZ0MEQVCoqWqoKoHj3_wXvJrcDzhxoKaI8FjzeSq5Da-YvLUX00DIsqefPaExTv3unYLQCoFwuf73VQ5da0yOw2S-FEh0rc6QkivWpUF6JyUWpkcRmHVgLFLhU2WoMmjDSwT2YSpXmPu-v_jKQtvnVw8PWb-3uK0iD5L9FWMYzaA7fOc2uvS7Q4Shk5B5TyTS7fB2AXScV4xscbSLPVGjm-JTMGWXYLT1dc30G0KVds5of1Vs0Ozt4z8UIQxkNA==&c=lCuplWFNQ_Yw7YjvuS3h2LIaw2QsDKUFcZ-DR477g64_2wOjjC3isQ==&ch=e_yPCS8KplBIW3nZM-Wb1KakCBmHHmZS843A_5TiJEPzhvEQTSlW5g==)**
I am counting on you to do that or more to help me BEAT this FINAL goal. Will you do everything you absolutely can to help us keep Texas red? **FINAL END OF MONTH DEADLINE** 8X Match: **ACTIVATED** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yO6rbw9_HadJqZUZc9Kw6J5UsichnKHsM4VIvAs7naEUP4y7V39HZgKQmecJJCPC9ZLtn2lAkARPQHltiJ8HKBZUOWa3zDPEIKPhNJJhpOujHoIibkTDfQA1UYmklsoYcoySg5TU-Le4xVroUV9iafBxqbLOMNOzuh97XS1miuWgLLGI0VQw_QvztzsbCfA8uMEEXJ_fQPfTDnNgiPFLDl4L8bEtdZTlK8J7tDWJPOOKDMF2Af5lASqfM6xKQvmybqlNF2XmQ9pmS8hgpk5NyLWACt-SMpXPWEBNILA6SH_5FCN7xbbmnuhxvp0kzJ3Q6RTHZwLwjfqlAvkkRz5P68KQRxjs7lqE3Vn6JRAbgqM=&c=lCuplWFNQ_Yw7YjvuS3h2LIaw2QsDKUFcZ-DR477g64_2wOjjC3isQ==&ch=e_yPCS8KplBIW3nZM-Wb1KakCBmHHmZS843A_5TiJEPzhvEQTSlW5g==) We're up against an opponent who wants to institute a job-killing carbon tax.
Someone who stands with radical liberal groups who want to defund our police.
Someone who lacks the demeanor needed to lead effectively.
It's absolutely imperative that we show her that true Texans aren't on board with her radical agenda.
**[We can't do that without hitting our goal, Friend. If we stumble across this last hurdle, we'll come in second](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yO6rbw9_HadJqZUZc9Kw6J5UsichnKHsM4VIvAs7naEUP4y7V39HZgKQmecJJCPC9ZLtn2lAkARPQHltiJ8HKBZUOWa3zDPEIKPhNJJhpOujHoIibkTDfQA1UYmklsoYcoySg5TU-Le4xVroUV9iafBxqbLOMNOzuh97XS1miuWgLLGI0VQw_QvztzsbCfA8uMEEXJ_fQPfTDnNgiPFLDl4L8bEtdZTlK8J7tDWJPOOKDMF2Af5lASqfM6xKQvmybqlNF2XmQ9pmS8hgpk5NyLWACt-SMpXPWEBNILA6SH_5FCN7xbbmnuhxvp0kzJ3Q6RTHZwLwjfqlAvkkRz5P688zmfKcHVJqgtioaf15UeY=&c=lCuplWFNQ_Yw7YjvuS3h2LIaw2QsDKUFcZ-DR477g64_2wOjjC3isQ==&ch=e_yPCS8KplBIW3nZM-Wb1KakCBmHHmZS843A_5TiJEPzhvEQTSlW5g==). **
We can't afford that.
I need your help immediately, we don't have much time at all!
John Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. name: Team NHGOP
subject: We're almost there.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
Derek, we are almost there.
Polls released by the University of New Hampshire yesterday are now showing that we are on the verge of **FLIPPING** the New Hampshire House, Senate, and Executive Council.

As the polls show our hard work paying off, we can't give up now. We need to continue to mobilize our voters and get out the vote over these next 4 days in order to ensure we have something to celebrate on Tuesday night. [_Your donation today will empower us to increase our GOTV and persuasion efforts_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQzNDQ2NjIxODE0MDAyOTMxJmM9YTlsNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDI2Nzg0OTImZD1wNnozbzJr.noKM692y6_I3qfu8gi8IUgBM3HPUSkQ-skMPmHrZ06U) between now and election day and enable us to take back the New Hampshire House, Senate, and Executive Council.

We have all put a lot into this effort since the Democrats took over the General Court and Executive Council in 2018. Republicans have testified at countless committee meetings, rallied around Governor Chris Sununu's vetoes, organized new town committees, recruited a new and bold field of candidates, and have made record setting voter contacts. Campaigns across the state, up and down the ballot, have knocked on doors and made phone calls. The NHGOP has invested more this year than ever before in targeted digital and mail programs in strategic ways to get out the vote and support Republicans up and down the ballot. It's been a long two years, but victory is now clearly in our sights.
Now is not the time to rest on our laurels. These polls might make us feel good today but nothing will feel better than securing our victory next week. There is so much at stake on Tuesday and we need to make sure we can get our candidates across the finish line. Our candidates and committees are doing everything they can to win up and down the ballot on election day, but [_your donation today will help the NHGOP increase our efforts over these truly critical next few days._](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQzNDQ2NjIxODE0MDAyOTMxJmM9YTlsNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDI2Nzg0OTgmZD11MXg2azdv.vadHued1eLxWcUanJGSExHq_iCmbAsazL5izGk-Chyg)

body:
On Monday, the Senate took decisive action and confirmed judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court of the United States, and fulfilled their Constitutional duty.
Friend,

On Monday, the Senate took decisive action and confirmed judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court of the United States, and fulfilled their Constitutional duty.

As a proud Hoosier, American, mother, and wife, Justice Barrett will bring her years of experience to the highest court in the land. I am proud to support Justice Barrett and look forward to her leadership on the bench.

However, the far Left continues to denounce Justice Barrett and the Constitutional process, which occurred. They've threatened to pack the court and reform the entire judiciary. We have to protect our courts, Friend, will you stand with me?

name: Jason Lewis
subject: Here it is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
This could determine the race, %%First Name%%

Dear Friend,

First, I want to say thank you. I know I have emailed you a lot in the last couple of days, but it is only because tomorrow's deadline will make all of the difference in whether we keep our Republican Majority next Tuesday.

We've come so far because of the support of patriots like you, Friend. This campaign has made tremendous strides, even compared to where we were just ONE month ago.

_**We are now within 1 POINT of my ultra-liberal, defund the police opponent, Tina Smith.**_

We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. body:

name: Cory Gardner
subject: This week could decide it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
There is no question that this week will play a crucial role in determining America's future. National Democrats have repeatedly proven that they play by a different set of rules, propping up radical John Hickenlooper, while the media hides his ethics violations.

Friend,

There is no question that this week will play a crucial role in determining America's future. National Democrats have repeatedly proven that they play by a different set of rules, propping up radical John Hickenlooper, while the media hides his ethics violations.

After being found guilty of ethics violations on multiple accounts, Chuck Schumer's mega-donors stepped in to ensure that they can get their guy across the finish line. I've chosen to work hard for Coloradans and will continue to do so if re-elected.

But, I need your help, Friend. As Chuck Schumer's top target, they've berated our race with nasty attack ads and millions of outside funds. Could you pitch in now, in this critical time, to help me secure Colorado?

**[**DEFEND CO - DONATE TODAY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sorf8WxwzLa79kbqg_FuYyqtGPWEahYHsxOMCetzrz5EaFv7ry11oNnAs3zBFN3Z-N4UwpmWSzVBtwsenlUr4-N-g0w20Wj35_wj-IKhsybLHD0iT8-sdXgXBbYlLPNnr3b5M-0owaD-soez2bMr8NZRXVPc3yt3uuxBLeIBoElXCb-kz-Rrp1y0zHWNn85OEei9GDXXnXNe85EwPsE9SNMbCksc2UoM4LpDAoogklytZ4W_wCfOKUNddu1g8EFgpWo_gXA3uml_jFp29xAjN3HfjYc22g_m2sEwvlJSFshDcB8zcsX9xjLZaQdT5FxXhVJEpMQWezLfugdqLQb7zDudH1Nhc2hsnXnPRVSFuMExHk-4Nu2UvkpsuemP_la3rAbmpyDwfJBT9nh1YkI6gzPXITiL49F6p8uk62kHW5wobt37fFuyNeTiv_MCunrcHO-uGsIxzqw=&c=gIyQTzUACbHubUdxEMFlDXdW0UiYGNGPQgyWm8fgH1v0aZj8S7OzDA==&ch=-RAeGgF0rEMjxmlqiWa20pmWwzcwBXGfpK_7iuvcxEtxX6CkD1JsqQ==)**

Friend,
---
Our campaign is about hope.
---
When we flipped the first congressional seat in California since 1998, we gave hope to the millions of Californians who've been sick and tired of seeing disastrous policies from Sacramento crush our great state.
---
We proved that commonsense Republican ideas __can__ win in California.
---
**In 4 days, we have a choice to make. Will we build on our momentum to keep moving California in the right direction or will we lose this hard-fought seat to Pelosi again?**
---
**_I don 't want to end this race with ANY regrets. Because this is our home that we're fighting for, so I have to ask for your support one more time._**

Susie has been a leading voice for access to higher education, good-paying jobs, and quality health care during her time in Congress. But Donald Trump is determined to flip Nevada red, making NV-03 a top target. If we don’t buckle down in the final days leading up to this critical election, it could cost us this seat. So I’m sounding the alarm -- We cannot defend Battleground NV-03 without your help. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Donald Trump said it himself: If Susie’s Republican opponent flips this seat red, Donald Trump wins Battleground Nevada. And we have to act fast -- a top GOP super PAC just launched a $142,000 ad buy this week in addition to the $2.5 million that national Republicans have already spent attacking Susie Lee. body:
| |
---
Hi Friend⏤ With the most consequential election of our lifetime**just 4 days away** now, I hope that you will join me in supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. Thank you so much for all that you have done already. As we get closer to Election Day, it's critical that we take nothing for granted and do everything we can to ensure success on Tuesday, and reach out to voters in swing states in as many ways as possible. We are hosting virtual phone banks all this weekend, where you can help make calls to swing states like Florida, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. It's fun, easy, and is how we're going to make sure we win. **Would you be willing to join me and sign up for a virtual phone bank this weekend?** If so, please contact Kate, Alexandra, and Joey **[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/po6otki6e6f4WIa70iXEyPFRtN5UV-26N-suAjwFV4g=/7cdQq69Wy6HqtKnu5bWd3Oq73KdDfIXzcxXgK6PNsi0=)** or by replying to this email, and they will get you set up. We're already off to a great start, but **I 'm trying to find 150 new volunteers to phone bank** this weekend and help get out the vote for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris this Tuesday. Please let us know what might be possible. Thanks for your support. Gina

Friend,

I’ll get right to the point. In order to fully fund our Get Out The Vote efforts in the final days of this campaign, we need to raise another $13,750 to reach our $25,000 goal -- and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us reach it.

**This race could be decided by just a handful of votes, which is why we have to do everything we can to turn out as many voters as possible between now and Tuesday.** If we turn out enough voters to flip this seat from red to blue, we can also help Joe Biden win in Florida -- the biggest battleground state in the entire country.

**Despite the high turnout so far here on the Suncoast, there’s still a lot of people who could help us win this election who have yet to vote. That’s where you come in, friend.**

clean_body: I’ll get right to the point. Friend, I’ll get right to the point. In order to fully fund our Get Out The Vote efforts in the final days of this campaign, we need to raise another $13,750 to reach our $25,000 goal -- and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us reach it. This race could be decided by just a handful of votes, which is why we have to do everything we can to turn out as many voters as possible between now and Tuesday. If we turn out enough voters to flip this seat from red to blue, we can also help Joe Biden win in Florida -- the biggest battleground state in the entire country. Despite the high turnout so far here on the Suncoast, there’s still a lot of people who could help us win this election who have yet to vote. That’s where you come in, friend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = This race is currently a statistical tie according to the latest poll and any amount you can contribute to help power our campaign will make a difference, but time is running out. Let’s get out the vote and win this thing! Margaret PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. subject: Who's best for Iowa?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| This is Lieutenant Governor Adam Gregg, writing to share my full endorsement of my friend, Senator Randy Feenstra.

Randy is exactly who the Fourth District needs in Congress – an experienced, effective leader with a positive vision for the future of Iowa and America. As a Sioux County native myself, I know Randy stands for what this district believes. He’s someone that has built a track record of results on those values in the Iowa Senate, where he passed the largest income tax cut in state history, fought to protect unborn life, and worked with us to balance the state budget.
**WATCH:**
---
| [ ](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=8809d61b86&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
|
---
| I encourage you all to vote for Randy, and if you can, consider chipping in $5, $10, or anything you can spare to help him reach persuadable voters across the district and push back against the millions of dollars being spent against him by out-of-state liberal activists trying to flip our district blue.

name: Team Carney
subject: 4 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/95iTtuzLwLiYSANQyTZzHg==/aDi_dzYo8zi5YmPGnKzPEg==?midqs=xRgU_sXNzaV7wTuojyG3mw==)
---

**FROM THE TEAM**

Throughout COVID-19, Governor Carney has focused first on protecting lives and working hard to keep our community and our economy healthy.

From a budget perspective, we were prepared for this crisis because of the Governor's collaboration with the General Assembly to build a $125 million reserve fund when the economy was strong before the pandemic. This allowed us to navigate this crisis without tax increases or cuts to important services.

The Governor also continues to invest where it matters most -- funding the largest public infrastructure program in Delaware history. Expanding broadband, cleaning up our drinking water, building new schools and rebuilding roads and bridges.

In a second term, he will continue to focus on the issues that matter most to every Delaware community: good jobs, world-class schools, and a great place to live.

**There are 4 days until Election Day. **

Share the below message with your friends and family to make sure we continue building a healthy community and a strong economy.
[Share](https://act.myngp.com/el/95iTtuzLwLiYSANQyTZzHg==/DeUg4eL1vbz73D3jVjiJmw==) | [Tweet](https://act.myngp.com/el/95iTtuzLwLiYSANQyTZzHg==/rThbZ880QuE9PWig6JMw2w==)

name: Roger Misso
subject: Show Deb Haaland that we have her back and return the first Native American woman to the House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. Our final endorsement of the 2020 Election cycle is also the one we are most proud of - [we support Rep. Deb Haaland (NM-01), one of the first two Native American women elected to Congress, for re-election.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dDfiVIz4jO2JTzE0G-tkA6kh0WVltPcbtu5GdgUkXe8=/nQveJtOmyK7CC5Xn7jbOosAchGmgxwL_YUMjtUuIDvg=)

Both of Deb's parents served in uniform - her mother is a Navy veteran and her father was awarded the Silver Star for his heroism as a United States Marine. From them, she learned about selfless service and toughness - values she has taken with her to Congress. Leveraging her campaign slogan, "Be Fierce," Deb has amassed impressive legislative accomplishments while also making history as one of the first two Native American women ever elected to the United States Congress. She gives little girls and native people everywhere hope - and we need to do all we can to keep her as a bold, fierce leader in the House.

That's why we need **_you._** We want to make sure Deb has what she needs to win, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/dDfiVIz4jO2JTzE0G-tkA6kh0WVltPcbtu5GdgUkXe8=/nQveJtOmyK7CC5Xn7jbOosAchGmgxwL_YUMjtUuIDvg=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $2500! Will you help us give Deb a major boost by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/dDfiVIz4jO2JTzE0G-tkA6kh0WVltPcbtu5GdgUkXe8=/nQveJtOmyK7CC5Xn7jbOosAchGmgxwL_YUMjtUuIDvg=)

Thank you for your support. When we re-elect Deb, we will be helping to give a voice to underrepresented communities everywhere - and we will hold the House!

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/dDfiVIz4jO2JTzE0G-tkA6kh0WVltPcbtu5GdgUkXe8=/9qaMPiW1ImWTM019h_XFg2a4ZpNGNYoBUJvZIbb3kxs=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/dDfiVIz4jO2JTzE0G-tkA6kh0WVltPcbtu5GdgUkXe8=/hHS7JGalag3F62QJZDm1HwtJq_6cGttaQ4rZgmgNP4I=)

name: James Carville
subject: Trump SCREWED
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd67/18e32a7f/4b4d6055/7b20962b/218757417/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Sara Gideon
subject: I am humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Senator Rosen said I could reach out, team.
I am humbly asking you to make a contribution to support my campaign against Senator Collins in Maine.
Because here is the truth:
**Our race is very likely to determine control of the U.S. Senate.**
And everything from our health care to voting rights to reproductive freedom could hinge on who controls the Senate.
And we know that if Susan Collins is reelected, Mitch McConnell will stay in control of the Senate.
That's why he is spending outrageous amounts of money to save this seat for Senator Collins and stay in power in Washington.
So I have to ask:
****[Can I count on you to split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen today, before it's too late to make a difference?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201029-sara-gideon?refcode=em201029i_4711&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
We are funding this campaign the right way, with lots and lots of people chipping in small amounts because they know how important it is that we flip this Senate seat and replace Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader.
I am so proud of that fact. But it does mean we are extraordinarily dependent on grassroots contributions from supporters like you.
That's why this request is so important -- especially right now, with hundreds of thousands of Mainers already casting ballots early.
****[So please, split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen if you can afford it.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201029-sara-gideon?refcode=em201029i_4711&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
It means so much to me to know you have my back in this final stretch before Election Day. Thank you for your support.
All my best,
Sara Gideon
** **
** **
******[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201029-sara-gideon?refcode=em201029i_4711&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")******

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d86cd/4fbb2af3/20141f57/5e81bb44/2399572803/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195

body:

Dear Connor,

In the Marines, our motto is Semper Fi. _**Always faithful.**_

[**As your Senator, I 've worked hard to honor my commitments to Alaskans:**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Yaa85bWeNp9a7R4Gq3kG7SFkVP2WLleluySFWuiHW4w6HFwqr7DIGEbL1NvlYtKZVuedjpoQ0cU35cmZwIc7zF3ZKuCvpboyY7z7oqGiS9kHHaVkMTZQglFg_gzx9RVIadLVaAdenCVCPBCvN_OVEvMdAFmwb1EVoAHXhW9qaZuYX2RUjYVMV4e7bZvqcQDkxUKqCQenfEbRz2vLKpsKto9-5YzUWCb2K8w0vnWeco1KbEGoWQoZGyNXeszgsAmRhHXTUPtyjn1fVXL3ElAg6yjNHW61hXWSuvasW_iJglsE4clMVEz-gjh8rX66wO6uf6kx7-1Y7uKxROxh-Wn-48UC75gmtG74PfUwS0dyfq21WYk5_zXw7S5g928DRxUqadNcO3_on3GowltB64_hW08W4Yafjj0pZuYHU3tv0aU=&c=fCUGT_ZfeMIG98htd-J54KaRWPoJRP9o1QRhqMbvdlLtK0keOAwzQQ==&ch=rKzlFkGGQlm69O7BR8Rtq7tfNLEK1AxfUS4s_uROwtef9IRM6RQ5MA==)
* Expanding energy production and defending against job-killing policies like the Green New Deal
* Providing veterans with better care
* Securing historic military investments for our state - including new F35 fighters, Coast Guard icebreakers, and state-of-the-art missile detection and defense systems
* Passing the Save our Seas bills to keep our oceans clean
* _**And always putting the best interests of our state first.**_

Now, the stakes are higher. I'm fighting even harder to keep Alaskans safe and to get our economy moving again.

[**With just 8 days until the election, will you make an $8 donation to help get our message out to Alaskans before they cast their vote?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Yaa85bWeNp9a7R4Gq3kG7SFkVP2WLleluySFWuiHW4w6HFwqr7DIGEbL1NvlYtKZVuedjpoQ0cU35cmZwIc7zF3ZKuCvpboyY7z7oqGiS9kHHaVkMTZQglFg_gzx9RVIadLVaAdenCVCPBCvN_OVEvMdAFmwb1EVoAHXhW9qaZuYX2RUjYVMV4e7bZvqcQDkxUKqCQenfEbRz2vLKpsKto9-5YzUWCb2K8w0vnWeco1KbEGoWQoZGyNXeszgsAmRhHXTUPtyjn1fVXL3ElAg6yjNHW61hXWSuvasW_iJglsE4clMVEz-gjh8rX66wO6uf6kx7-1Y7uKxROxh-Wn-48UC75gmtG74PfUwS0dyfq21WYk5_zXw7S5g928DRxUqadNcO3_on3GowltB64_hW08W4Yafjj0pZuYHU3tv0aU=&c=fCUGT_ZfeMIG98htd-J54KaRWPoJRP9o1QRhqMbvdlLtK0keOAwzQQ==&ch=rKzlFkGGQlm69O7BR8Rtq7tfNLEK1AxfUS4s_uROwtef9IRM6RQ5MA==)

[EXPRESS DONATE $8](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Yaa85bWeNp9a7R4Gq3kG7SFkVP2WLleluySFWuiHW4w6HFwqr7DIGEbL1NvlYtKZVuedjpoQ0cU35cmZwIc7zF3ZKuCvpboyY7z7oqGiS9kHHaVkMTZQglFg_gzx9RVIadLVaAdenCVCPBCvN_OVEvMdAFmwb1EVoAHXhW9qaZuYX2RUjYVMV4e7bZvqcQDkxUKqCQenfEbRz2vLKpsKto9-5YzUWCb2K8w0vnWeco1KbEGoWQoZGyNXeszgsAmRhHXTUPtyjn1fVXL3ElAg6yjNHW61hXWSuvasW_iJglsE4clMVEz-gjh8rX66wO6uf6kx7-1Y7uKxROxh-Wn-48UC75gmtG74PfUwS0dyfq21WYk5_zXw7S5g928DRxUqadNcO3_on3GowltB64_hW08W4Yafjj0pZuYHU3tv0aU=&c=fCUGT_ZfeMIG98htd-J54KaRWPoJRP9o1QRhqMbvdlLtK0keOAwzQQ==&ch=rKzlFkGGQlm69O7BR8Rtq7tfNLEK1AxfUS4s_uROwtef9IRM6RQ5MA==)

Our best days are ahead of us. We've accomplished so much together in the last 6 years. I look forward to working with you to build on this progress.

[**Thank you for your continued support. **I can’t believe it.**

Election Day is just four days away. It’s been more of a marathon than a sprint and we couldn’t have done any of it without your support, but I’ll be honest – we need you in our corner now more than at any other point in the race.

The future of Congress – and in turn, the future of our entire country – comes down to what we do in these next four days and Nancy Pelosi and her super PACs are working overtime right now to put their agenda ahead of the American people for two more years.

clean_body: Nancy Pelosi and her super PACs are working harder overtime right now to put their agenda ahead of the American people for two more years ELECTION DAY COUNTDOWN | | | Friend, I can’t believe it. Election Day is just four days away. It’s been more of a marathon than a sprint and we couldn’t have done any of it without your support, but I’ll be honest – we need you in our corner now more than at any other point in the race. The future of Congress – and in turn, the future of our entire country – comes down to what we do in these next four days and Nancy Pelosi and her super PACs are working overtime right now to put their agenda ahead of the American people for two more years. This is it, friend. Tuesday’s coming up and this is our last chance to fight back and get Congress back to its original mission – working for the American people! Nancy Pelosi has NO intention of standing up for our police officers over the next two years. Nancy Pelosi has NO intention of putting America first over the next two years. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Justice ACB, Final Push to Re-Elect Trump, Big-Tech Censorship, and more
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20304-1b076dd4c4cf45b1b29b627e7d829e44/75/328/e352853f-1f9d-4840-8201-33fd3b5a852f)** | |
---
This week, Amy Coney Barrett made history.

Following her nomination by President Trump, the United States Senate voted 52 - 48 to confirm Judge Barrett to the Supreme Court of the United States. In doing so, Justice Barrett became the 5th woman appointed to the court since its inception in 1789.

Democrats and so-called “feminists” were not pleased.

Those that claim to be the “party of women” and “support all women,” did exactly the opposite. They openly expressed outrage at Justice Barrett’s confirmation, hurling everything from insults to threats of court packing. **[In fact, right now, you can sign our petition opposing the left’s efforts to pack the court.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ob2xkdGhlbmluZS5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MjkwMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=kzCOD3cm7vWmHkM0GIHf4w)**

Isn’t it revealing that those who claim to be the biggest supporters of female empowerment, couldn’t be more upset when an extremely qualified woman is elevated to the highest court in the land? Maybe that’s because the truth is they don't stand for all women... they only support women who submit to their leftist orthodoxy.

Nevertheless, they couldn’t stop it, and Justice Barrett’s confirmation and swearing-in will likely mark a turn for American jurisprudence. She is extremely qualified and will make a phenomenal Supreme Court justice, interpreting the law as it is written.

Congratulations to now-JUSTICE Amy Coney Barrett!
|
---

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%&K=dCvopm4xTh8vIJ29ghBFsg)

**[Prominent Journalist Quits Liberal Outlet He Founded Over Suppression of Biden Story](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%&K=QHSxqSP94sAZ6CpUow0uog)**
Indicting the liberal media for censorship, journalist Glenn Greenwald has publicly announced his resignation from The Intercept, which he helped found in 2013 with the goal of preventing censorship.
**[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%&K=wZJVfdSoMxb6OhY2jD_AIw)**
|
---
In mere days, Americans across our nation will go to the polls to decide who will be the next President of the United States.

For over a year now, we have been preparing for this day, encouraging all of you to make your voices heard and fulfill your most basic civic duty of voting.

Why?

Because, although it’s been said before, this truly is the most important election of our lifetime. The future of our country hangs in the balance.

This election isn’t just about taxes or healthcare, it’s about who we are as Americans. Are we a nation led by the mob that stands idly by as major American cities are burned down? Or are we a nation joined together by core beliefs, fighting for a better tomorrow for ALL Americans?

The Democrats’ platform is clear: if elected they will raise taxes, further destroy healthcare, and further divide our nation. They will also look to “fundamentally transform” our nation. They have promised to embrace socialism and bring its failed policies to our nation’s shores. Not only that but they have promised to pack the Supreme Court, effectively turning it into a left-leaning super legislature. They have no interest in making America great again, because they don’t think America is or ever has been great.

The Republican platform thinks differently. They want to help our nation recover from the coronavirus and build on the fantastic progress we had made prior to the coronavirus. They believe America is great, has been great, and can continue to be great.

The choice is yours, America, and the time to make your voice heard is rapidly approaching.
|
---

Speaking of the election, if you’d like to help get out the vote in these final few days, you can still volunteer with Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund to send text messages to voters in critical swing states!

Simply follow the instructions below to get started! Remember, every Trump vote is critical!

**To get started go to:[tpp.us/txt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTAwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=UHYDiF0xelyUyj0Vop1tqg)** – fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging.

**You will get a text message after you’ve signed up.** Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text.

[**If you need additional instructions, you can look through this guide**.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzLzIwMjBQMlBUZXh0aW5nSW5zdHJ1Y3Rpb25zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI5MDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=H30cdiCXoGWmLtHERkqRrQ) But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET.

_**And, of course, don’t forget to vote!**_
|

As we get closer to election day, Big-Tech interference in our elections continues to escalate.

Just this past week, as the CEO of Twitter was testifying before the Senate Judiciary Committee claiming his platform didn’t censor conservative voices, [Twitter censored a Customs and Border Patrol official](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xMzIxNjMwMTg4NDcyNjE5MDA5Lz9taWQ9NDI5MDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=-kvavQZlwdOKrWwQx67XwA) for simply pointing out that the border wall is working:

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA0LTFiMDc2ZGQ0YzRjZjQ1YjFiMjliNjI3ZTdkODI5ZTQ0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xMzIxNjMwMTg4NDcyNjE5MDA5Lz9taWQ9NDI5MDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=6zJZ557dJYcYaDmtF1kePQ)

This overt censorship by Big-Tech must be stopped. It’s time our elected officials stepped in and protected our right to speak freely!
|

clean_body: | | This week, Amy Coney Barrett made history. Following her nomination by President Trump, the United States Senate voted 52 - 48 to confirm Judge Barrett to the Supreme Court of the United States. In doing so, Justice Barrett became the 5th woman appointed to the court since its inception in 1789. Democrats and so-called “feminists” were not pleased. Those that claim to be the “party of women” and “support all women,” did exactly the opposite. They openly expressed outrage at Justice Barrett’s confirmation, hurling everything from insults to threats of court packing. Isn’t it revealing that those who claim to be the biggest supporters of female empowerment, couldn’t be more upset when an extremely qualified woman is elevated to the highest court in the land? Maybe that’s because the truth is they don't stand for all women... they only support women who submit to their leftist orthodoxy. Nevertheless, they couldn’t stop it, and Justice Barrett’s confirmation and swearing-in will likely mark a turn for American jurisprudence. She is extremely qualified and will make a phenomenal Supreme Court justice, interpreting the law as it is written. Congratulations to now-JUSTICE Amy Coney Barrett! | Indicting the liberal media for censorship, journalist Glenn Greenwald has publicly announced his resignation from The Intercept, which he helped found in 2013 with the goal of preventing censorship. | In mere days, Americans across our nation will go to the polls to decide who will be the next President of the United States. For over a year now, we have been preparing for this day, encouraging all of you to make your voices heard and fulfill your most basic civic duty of voting. Why? Because, although it’s been said before, this truly is the most important election of our lifetime. The future of our country hangs in the balance. This election isn’t just about taxes or healthcare, it’s about who we are as Americans. Are we a nation led by the mob that stands idly by as major American cities are burned down? Or are we a nation joined together by core beliefs, fighting for a better tomorrow for ALL Americans? The Democrats’ platform is clear: if elected they will raise taxes, further destroy healthcare, and further divide our nation. They will also look to “fundamentally transform” our nation. They have promised to embrace socialism and bring its failed policies to our nation’s shores. Not only that but they have promised to pack the Supreme Court, effectively turning it into a left-leaning super legislature. They have no interest in making America great again, because they don’t think America is or ever has been great. The Republican platform thinks differently. They want to help our nation recover from the coronavirus and build on the fantastic progress we had made prior to the coronavirus. They believe America is great, has been great, and can continue to be great. The choice is yours, America, and the time to make your voice heard is rapidly approaching. | The U.S. economy continues to rebound at a historic rate after being ravaged by the coronavirus pandemic and the public and government response to it earlier this year. | Speaking of the election, if you’d like to help get out the vote in these final few days, you can still volunteer with Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund to send text messages to voters in critical swing states! Simply follow the instructions below to get started! Remember, every Trump vote is critical! To get started go to: – fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging. You will get a text message after you’ve signed up. Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text. But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET. And, of course, don’t forget to vote! | Democrats are losing their collective minds over the confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett to the United States Supreme Court. | As we get closer to election day, Big-Tech interference in our elections continues to escalate. Just this past week, as the CEO of Twitter was testifying before the Senate Judiciary Committee claiming his platform didn’t censor conservative voices, for simply pointing out that the border wall is working: This overt censorship by Big-Tech must be stopped. It’s time our elected officials stepped in and protected our right to speak freely! | Leading up to election day, Reverend Franklin Graham made a pre-election proclamation thanking God for all that President Trump has accomplished! The Rev. Franklin Graham gave President Donald Trump a ringing endorsement a week before the election in a viral Facebook post Monday about voting. | Check out these great ads about President Trump’s accomplishments and the Democrats’ threats to destroy our Constitution. And, after you watch them, share them on social media and email! | A Democratic city councilman in Flint, Michigan, has endorsed President Donald Trump’s re-election bid as the president vies for votes in the battleground state. | |

name: Bill Olson
subject: We have to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw

Hi Peter,

I have worked hard, fought, allied myself with the President in this Florida district- and now I'm surging ahead.

But now I need your help urgently to close this deal!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw
!

This race will be close. It's a swing district that had a Republican Congressman this decade- but now has Pelosi clone Darren Soto occupying the seat!

Earlier polls had us in a dead heat:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw

BUT NOW RECENT POLLING SHOWS I'VE OPENED UP A SMALL LEAD!

With just days to go before election day, we can pull this upset off- but I need your help desperately!

Why am I surging? Because I've exposed Soto as attached to the hip to Nancy Pelosi!

“The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues."

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw

This race will revolve around turnout of Trump voters. If Trump wins my district, I will too. Our country needs the President- and needs me to beat Soto so that we don't have Pelosi as Speaker anymore!

THIS RACE WILL BE CLOSE. I need your help most urgently to push me over the top! Join my 4,000 patriots who are helping me flip this district! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw

Trump is fighting for Florida. My district is a key area he's focusing on- and together we can win! Trump is overperforming among Hispanic voters. If we win here, we win Florida. That's why I need your help!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST the Marxist Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw
today? We need TV ads and GOTV expenditures- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=irGVzxL6WF6OuRU&b=crPh2LBud6El498sWgsxQw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Final PUSH from Senator Cory Booker to get us across the finish line!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , With only 4 days left in this election, it's crunch time! We have to do everything possible to get voters to turn out and vote. My team and I have been working around the clock, to make sure our message reaches every community and every voter in the Commonwealth, because failure is not an option!! NJ Senator Cory Booker, who has endorsed my candidacy for Auditor General, says it best - "At a time that so many people are trying to undermine the truth and obscure facts, we need a scientist in a role like this. Nina Ahmad will hold corporations, government agencies and politicians accountable." I am honored and humbled to have earned the endorsement of this trailblazing leader and I can't wait to start fighting for the people of Pennsylvanians as the next Auditor General. Watch the entire endorsement here: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/YZmcNUNnkN8kJyqn559TAaOgAH8lwUCpj13zo4QZFIY=?v=xakxQu3jYno) [Click here to view full video](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/YZmcNUNnkN8kJyqn559TAaOgAH8lwUCpj13zo4QZFIY=?v=xakxQu3jYno) I know that many of you have already voted and many more have a plan to vote between now and November 3rd. Please keep pushing - encourage your friends and family to vote. You can help our campaign to continue messaging to voters by making a [contribution HERE.](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/l04qXxvPbk8YGHSRDSqOQpoOKNcaZkjsDdMriOa2Ddk=) The stakes are too high for any of us to sit on the sidelines. [Can you please help me today with $5, $10, $20.20 or $100? Can I count on you to help get my message to all of PA? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/l04qXxvPbk8YGHSRDSqOQpoOKNcaZkjsDdMriOa2Ddk=) Thank you for your vote and your support Humbly Yours, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/an8KGrIR5bwi83tKu03NkEbbFc-7fuTW2BZwlrJLlyE=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/l04qXxvPbk8YGHSRDSqOQpoOKNcaZkjsDdMriOa2Ddk=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/1TxGAKf0bMyIjLLw6ZEhP6w8iqI7fDHQFWx_cO5FL1Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/RtWRcuHamEbZqdwe1YqpuPiKR3SQ6wW3JX9ecj_2N20=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQYxYLpvvQ1kF8wKow6N1Np_wHwE3i3ztCHhIMYeo94=/Ttz_DO-WEPSY8rzPCHrGPZefu-PetLDR9-qyiDE-SfY=?hl=en)

I am honored and humbled to have earned the endorsement of this trailblazing leader and I can't wait to start fighting for the people of Pennsylvanians as the next Auditor General. Watch the entire endorsement here: I know that many of you have already voted and many more have a plan to vote between now and November 3rd. Please keep pushing - encourage your friends and family to vote. You can help our campaign to continue messaging to voters by making a = The stakes are too high for any of us to sit on the sidelines. = Thank you for your vote and your support Humbly Yours, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: = = Follow us on Social Media: = = Copyright (C) Nina for PA. All rights reserved. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It is powerfully important that we hit this goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
In the next few days, we're pitching in to support Warren Democrats in competitive races across the country. It's all powered by grassroots donors, and we need to hit our last goal by midnight tomorro | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852511f/45c30650/1c7ca4d11/66eb5fe1/913571215/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'll just be blunt: Tomorrow's our last grassroots fundraising deadline of the election, and it would make a real difference if you're able to chip in.

In the next few days, we're pitching in to support Warren Democrats in competitive races across the country. It's all powered by grassroots donors, and we need to hit our last goal by midnight tomorrow. But we're not quite there yet.

**I'm only asking because it is powerfully important:**

**[If you can, please make a donation of $2 or whatever makes sense before midnight tomorrow-- the final grassroots fundraising fundraising deadline of this election -- to support Warren Democrats and help turn the page on this dark chapter in our nation's history. ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852511f/45c30650/1c7ca4d11/66eb5fe0/913571215/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjBGX0VPTV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW20F_EOM_EWD_E_20201030_V1S2_P")**

I'm in this fight all the way because I am dog-tired of hearing from Donald Trump and his Republican enablers. I am tired of leaders driving our country into the ground.

So I've endorsed some new voices -- 150 candidates around the country who believe that government can be a powerful force for good. Who believe that we can make progress on our toughest challenges if competence and moral clarity rule the day. Who can help take back the Senate, protect our House majority, and work at every level of government to put people first.

Just imagine a Senate where Mitch McConnell doesn't kill all progress. That Democratic Senate is within our reach. We also have a chance to take back key state houses from Republican control, so we can stop voter suppression and gerrymandering.

By fighting side by side, we can realize the America of our best imaginations. And remember, the next step begins when our election ends: our grassroots movement must continue to push those in power to pass the big, structural change that we're voting for.

**It's an honor to be in this fight with you. We can win this -- but only if we stay in this fight all the way. We've got to keep pushing, and that's only possible with the support of grassroots donors like you.**

**[If you're able to make a donation at this time, will you pitch in before midnight tomorrow to help hit this last fundraising goal of the election? Every donation goes a long way to help support Warren Democrats and our grassroots movement. And now that voting is almost over, the stakes have never been higher.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852511f/45c30650/1c7ca4d11/66eb5fe0/913571215/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjBGX0VPTV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW20F_EOM_EWD_E_20201030_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852511f/45c30650/1c7ca4d11/66eb5fe0/913571215/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjBGX0VPTV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMTAzMF9WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW20F_EOM_EWD_E_20201030_V1S2_P")

name: Tracy Newman, JayInslee.com
subject: Don't listen to polls. Don't listen to pundits.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is it.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8213%2E868730%2E8JpJ4Q) Friend, Our final fundraising deadline of the election is tomorrow. Don't listen to the polls. Don't listen to the pundits. All we can trust is that we've done all we can to build a better future for ourselves and the people we love -- that includes investing _in_ Jay's leadership and _against_ an opponent who wants to undo all of it. **[Donate $5 or more to help us raise $75,000 by tomorrow's FINAL midnight deadline -- we're $14,874 short, and every dollar will go toward the final push to ensure Jay's elected again next week.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13474?t=4&akid=8213%2E868730%2E8JpJ4Q)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13475?t=5&akid=8213%2E868730%2E8JpJ4Q)

We know the polls said Democrats would win big in 2016. We now know those polls were wrong.
We can't afford to be wrong again -- we know what's at stake, and we know how much progress we'll lose if we lose this time.
An investment right now is an investment in the belief that our leaders should be moral, they should be strong, and they should be decisive in the choices they make for the health and well-being of the people they represent. Jay's done that time and time again, and there's more work to be done -- but we'll only make progress if we win next week.
**[Finish this election strong: Help hit our FINAL $75,000 goal by midnight tomorrow by donating $5 or more right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13474?t=11&akid=8213%2E868730%2E8JpJ4Q)**

Tracy

| | **[BREAKING: Donald Trump holds Omaha rally to secure NE-02, the district that could DECIDE the 2020 Presidential race](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8cc/77d4c309/222adb44/2635b27e/267818586/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201028_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** [**_Peter, this is the MOST IMPORTANT ask I 've ever made of you. Donald Trump descended on Omaha to destroy my chances. I need a record-breaking response -- 956 gifts in the next 12 hours -- to make this rally BACKFIRE. Or he will wipe out my 2-point lead. This is so urgent that for the first time ever each gift will be 5X-MATCHED >> _**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8cc/77d4c309/222adb44/2635b27e/267818586/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201028_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I need you to make a choice right now, Peter:

\-- We can let Trump swoop into OUR district, stop me from flipping this seat and score himself an electoral college vote.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8cc/77d4c309/222adb44/2635b266/267818586/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8cc/77d4c309/222adb44/2635b261/267818586/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8cc/77d4c309/222adb44/2635b260/267818586/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

clean_body: Democrats are terrified we could win. | Friend, Kamala Harris is coming to Houston, Texas TODAY to try and end our surging campaign. She knows the polls are tied and that the Democrat incumbent is too afraid to even debate me, so Kamala is going on a fundraising blitz for her at the final hour. But as I always say, Democrats should know better than to put a target on the back of a U.S. Army Captain. I always fight back. Kamala knows that my Democrat opponent would be a rubber stamp vote for her anti-energy agenda that would completely destroy Texas’ economy. That’s why Kamala announced earlier this year that she was going to go “all in” to help Texas Democrats -- and set my race as one of her top targets. She should’ve known better than to target me, because it’s not just me on this campaign... I have an ARMY of grassroots donors like you fighting by my side. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Senator Mike Lee
subject: He’s got the radical Left on the run
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alek for Oregon
body:
Alek Skarlatos needs our help. Please stand with me in support of his campaign before time runs out. The political pundits are finally calling a spade a spade and recognizing what we’ve known for months: The race in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District is a dead heat. Don't want to receive our emails? Peter,

When I was first elected to the United States Senate in 2010, I ran against an incumbent in my own party who I felt had been in Congress for too long. I prevailed because I brought a new vigor to the job for the people of Utah.

I see a lot of the same energy in my friend from Oregon, Alek Skarlatos. Alek is an American hero, a true patriot, and a man who was born to fight for the rights our founding fathers gave to us in our nation’s founding document. **[You might recall that Alek made headlines worldwide when in 2015, Alek and two fellow Americans foiled an Islamic terrorist from blowing up a French passenger train](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fe766d7fe5c844b59585ef18271477bb&_e=BKU39A43uMlZ3bf-_XM9ykn6eCmkFxADBye3q8vEnTwc9BFUBoiypCfnFlMlG1HXLaQ55kOAZIjrhbTGnHSskyAbEVB7Bqmxjp77fvb2_Sntg4GL8uxRgRbtyiOPoM_5SrcmeUFZQegQINkEl8tsuPbzvN2IYX3DhQXIdiI_XATzC7G6RVSJdkKihX9BK5f7AkaXs5siL5Wv0t3InbEPXv0MdwB9-FD8qM0pBSLU2EpqimyI82I7Ik4Z-bC0vpowLBHOGtWlpFab3EwZJJMpADu0OfbiMGLUTwxHaQc3NKYGeygwquGuSpiRY1LSkrRo)**.

Alek is in one of the most competitive House races in the country right now, and **[he needs our help](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fe766d7fe5c844b59585ef18271477bb&_e=BKU39A43uMlZ3bf-_XM9ykn6eCmkFxADBye3q8vEnTwc9BFUBoiypCfnFlMlG1HXLaQ55kOAZIjrhbTGnHSskyAbEVB7Bqmxjp77fvb2_SnPnINVlzFIubcOCCutAWomTBJKpD_GtKOabQXzQE9ZukhUmgcsqrmhxYofW6biT8ET1PGrUWJFPYcfh4_LxW2cXSvc5nmqHtcaTCXYelcoM0s9vWui7vd-I7-a0VJgwAGdVsbtSzpIcarVkm_ndDXHhUXPsNnREUszhsrQY1NqzJSd7842fSbyEWtxHSxwVtipdwG8i56LqAiXcgP9v1ri)**. His opponent is the original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal (authored by the notorious AOC), and has been in office since 1987 --- that’s longer than even Nancy Pelosi.

| [**Help Alek Finish Strong** **› › **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fe766d7fe5c844b59585ef18271477bb&_e=BKU39A43uMlZ3bf-_XM9ykn6eCmkFxADBye3q8vEnTwc9BFUBoiypCfnFlMlG1HXLaQ55kOAZIjrhbTGnHSskyAbEVB7Bqmxjp77fvb2_SmmuE4N9NHO7SVYvnZXB_VJYycgt-is1TkcI76hvDNUafSVSOx1_Lr7w5VjXTPCnAWioEHU54iVE_bU3oXvKcAvVk8U6B652dGnXuMeFnIJJ74pd51DgWsRty_S6MfIlosTsiQ8KKarkrUvhFzaxfVH41oaxtBvSUHIu4qlOnFD2p-hYqkIzJx-2ZLd-TjJOPuomeFTOqBqB8aDlJZtmwhB)

I need reinforcements to join me in Congress – in both the House and the Senate – because everything we believe in and everything we stand for as conservatives is under attacks. **[Please consider a gift to Alek’s campaign. Democrats are spending heavily to defend the incumbent because they know Alek is on the verge of dispatching him](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fe766d7fe5c844b59585ef18271477bb&_e=BKU39A43uMlZ3bf-_XM9ykn6eCmkFxADBye3q8vEnTwc9BFUBoiypCfnFlMlG1HXLaQ55kOAZIjrhbTGnHSskyAbEVB7Bqmxjp77fvb2_SlvUIHTu8H7hA3skHrW3BdpkorM4oBRcdiUIZ3bjKET071KlmEAPnUibaO9N01Qxfpexr-mcgRtlbKtYTCUTItnzV684R89P27oyo18oZspWX7P0ZueCTriJ8NEJGPnWuyx6NIdN7mC0yRQ6VTel3QmAl7Z_4RdP5TSjjR8UIKKQPIihGXZU47uh42SYU3RBkJ3Jv4CFBqBOqszzGW1lraX)**.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Reminder: Join Wesley For Our Final Super Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We hope you will join Wesley tomorrow morning at 10:00am to kick off our final Team Hunt Super Saturday before Election Day! Our incredible team of volunteers has helped us reach thousands of neighbors in the 7th District, and with your help, we can ensure that we get as many people to the polls as possible on Election Day.

Help us bring new leadership to the 7th District and join our Super Saturday tomorrow!

To participate, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com.

We hope to see you there!

Thank you,
Team Hunt

name: Brian Mast
subject: The Final End-of-Month Goal! Help Another Florida Patriot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P93SKlMD_3q-QBLC1hIbFcjGw92kxowsPvdsxqQasIQTIYRgXcQmNHgufRdczoXoaUmsUMxsPzGrq82YbeLrbUbNtezRHsPJhKpoXbgVRweVWDeNkIN4zx7Zk7M9e75A2aJWga84L0iEZvTynf-alwo6b1BDgzkJ4GawQrNGnblkYHbDI8Tb6TIdEEk02UlC&c=b6exYWKnFYyqCh-scum_p4RTocJ-c8BKBGECeyUTrsKfv_KWDiAObA==&ch=a8zT8FJKlJPnvokjcA2j37U8IUs0GbQHO1DtvTF6ob_hsF326nxrTw==)
---
| Peter,
Before the final end-of-month goal pre-Election Day, Congressman Matt Gaetz needs our support here in the state of Florida.
Matt is calling out corruption at every turn and showing the American People why the far-left's socialist agenda would be so destructive for our country. But this has only put a target on his back, and now Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat Machine are trying to unseat Matt Gaetz!
It's no wonder the Democrats are targeting Matt. He is President Trump's #1 Defender, and he has fought the liberal mob trying to remove the President from office. Matt fights especially hard for our military and our veterans, serving on the Armed Services Committee and representing more active military members than any other Congressman.
Matt is a colleague and friend of mine, and he is one of the strongest supporters of President Trump that there is. On a personal note, as a double-amputee veteran, I know that his support for our military and veterans is so important.
But unless we [stand with Matt today before this final goal](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P93SKlMD_3q-QBLC1hIbFcjGw92kxowsPvdsxqQasIQTIYRgXcQmNHgufRdczoXoaUmsUMxsPzGrq82YbeLrbUbNtezRHsPJhKpoXbgVRweVWDeNkIN4zx7Zk7M9e75A2aJWga84L0iEZvTynf-alwo6b1BDgzkJ4GawQrNGnblkYHbDI8Tb6TIdEEk02UlC&c=b6exYWKnFYyqCh-scum_p4RTocJ-c8BKBGECeyUTrsKfv_KWDiAObA==&ch=a8zT8FJKlJPnvokjcA2j37U8IUs0GbQHO1DtvTF6ob_hsF326nxrTw==), all of that is at risk. Will you please join me in supporting Matt Gaetz today in his fight to continue draining the swamp?

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter, Before the final end-of-month goal pre-Election Day, Congressman Matt Gaetz needs our support here in the state of Florida. Matt is calling out corruption at every turn and showing the American People why the far-left's socialist agenda would be so destructive for our country. But this has only put a target on his back, and now Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat Machine are trying to unseat Matt Gaetz! It's no wonder the Democrats are targeting Matt. He is President Trump's #1 Defender, and he has fought the liberal mob trying to remove the President from office. Matt fights especially hard for our military and our veterans, serving on the Armed Services Committee and representing more active military members than any other Congressman. Matt is a colleague and friend of mine, and he is one of the strongest supporters of President Trump that there is. On a personal note, as a double-amputee veteran, I know that his support for our military and veterans is so important. But unless we ==, all of that is at risk. Will you please join me in supporting Matt Gaetz today in his fight to continue draining the swamp? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Sincerely, | | Congressman Brian Mast (FL-18) Co-Chair, Florida Trump Re-Election Campaign | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. subject: Courageous Conservatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Win or lose, we need courageous conservatives in Congress. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/courageous-conservatives?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter,

The presidential election could be very close, and it's unclear at this point which candidate will win.

But we know that we need conservative fighters in Congress regardless of the outcome. We need leaders who will stand with President Trump if he wins and stand up to fight the Democrats' socialist policies if he loses.

That's why the House Freedom Fund only supports courageous conservatives like Jim Jordan (R-OH), Chip Roy (R-TX), Scott Perry (R-PA), and others. We know that we can count on them to keep their promises and fight for our principles and values.

[**As the final hours of this historic election go by, please make one final contribution to support these priority candidates.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=db2fa4a6e0&e=b2c16e6198)

✅ Lauren Boebert (CO-03)
✅ Nick Freitas (VA-07)
✅ Christina Hagan (OH-13)
✅ Yvette Herrell (NM-02)
✅ Jeanne Ives (IL-06)
✅ Jim Marchant (NV-04)
✅ Rich McCormick (GA-07)
✅ Matt Mowers (NH-01)
✅ Jim Oberweis (IL-14)
✅ Burgess Owens (UT-04)
✅ Scott Perry (PA-10)
✅ Greg Raths (CA-45)
✅ Matt Rosendale (MT-AL)
✅ Chip Roy (TX-21)

**Your donations will go directly into their campaigns and help them pay for their final TV ads and get-out-the-vote calls.**

[**Click here to support them before it's too late!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=7771fb6697&e=b2c16e6198)

This is our last chance to send leaders to Washington who will fight for freedom regardless of who is in the White House or who controls the House and Senate. Liberty is on the line and we must do everything we can to defend it.

Thank you for doing so much to support conservative leadership and fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

name: Judicial Watch News Release Alert
subject: Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton’s A REPUBLIC UNDER ASSUALT to Debut at #12 on the New York Times Hardcover Non-Fiction List
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that President Tom Fitton’s new book, A Republic Under Assault: The Left’s Ongoing Attack on American Freedom will debut at #12 on the New York Times Hardcover Non-Fiction List on November 8.
| | |
---
---
|
---
| Dear Judicial Watch Supporter,

You may have seen the latest news on Judicial Watch's social media but I wanted to be sure you received our press release that was sent to members of the media moments ago. We congratulate Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton on his new book, _A Republic Under Assault_ that is _ _ to be featured as a _New York Times_ bestseller _._ As always Judicial Watch will continue to fight against government corruption and abuse. Be sure to grab a copy for you and a family member! Thank you for standing with us.

Sincerely,
Amelia Koehn
Public Affairs Coordinator
---
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: 202-646-5188
October 30, 2020
* * *
---
|
---
| **Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton’s A REPUBLIC UNDER ASSUALT to Debut at #12 on the _New York Times_ Hardcover Non-Fiction List**
**(Washington, DC) -** Judicial Watch announced today that President Tom Fitton’s new book, _A Republic Under Assault: The Left’s Ongoing Attack on American Freedom_ will debut at #12 on the [_New York Times_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51909&L=21080&F=H&) Hardcover Non-Fiction List on November 8. The book will also come in at #14 on the Times’s Combined Print and E-Book Best Sellers List. Additionally, _A Republic Under Assault _will debut at #2 on _Publishers Weekly’s_ Top Hardcover Frontlist Nonfiction List and #4 on Publishers Weekly’s Overall Best Sellers List on November 2. The book has only been in bookstores nationwide since October 20.

A Republic Under Assault is Fitton’s third New York Times bestselling book. His first two bestselling books, [_The Corruption Chronicles_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51909&L=19542&F=H&) and [_Clean House_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51909&L=19543&F=H&), revealed what Judicial Watch, the largest watchdog agency in America, uncovered in its battles against Obama secrecy. _A Republic Under Assault_ is a hard-hitting, fast-paced look at how the Radical Left and the Deep State are trying to destroy the Trump presidency.

In Fitton’s latest investigative probe, he identifies four major forces posing a continued threat to American democracy:

**Deep State Efforts to Destroy the Trump Presidency:** How the Democratic National Committee and the Clinton campaign paid for the fraudulent anti-Trump “Steele Dossier,” and how it was used by the Obama FBI and DOJ to dupe the FISA Court to allow it to spy on the Trump presidential campaign AND President Trump. These and more dirty secrets of Obamagate and the impeachment coup attempt are exposed.

**Hillary Clinton Email Scandal:** How the Clinton team and senior officials at the Obama State Department conspired to cover up Hillary Clinton’s secret email system—and shocking revelations that tie the Obama White House to the cover-up!

**Voter Fraud:** How Soros-funded groups attack states that seek to protect clean elections by challenging voter ID laws, and how the Left is cynically peddling COVID-19 crisis electoral “reforms,” such as mail-in voting, which could increase voter fraud and election chaos. And shocking numbers about dirty voting rolls across the nation!

**Illegal Immigration:** How deadly illegal “sanctuary” policies are exploding across America, and how our nation’s sovereignty has been under assault by radical open-border advocates.

Subversive Deep State collaborators with ties to the Clinton and Obama machines not only launched countless—often illegal—operations to stop and then remove Trump, but even more alarmingly, are working to transform the United States into something truly unrecognizable to all who believe in liberty and the rule of law.

_Today_ one of their main targets is President Donald J. Trump.

_Tomorrow_ it could be you and anyone who believes in the U.S. Constitution, believes the United States must have clearly defined and protected borders, believes in the need for a strong military, believes in the value of hard work and faith, and believes in the rule of law and American exceptionalism.

“When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’" no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch. _A Republic Under Assault _lays bare the condemning facts Judicial Watch continues to expose about ‘Obamagate,’ the Deep State’s seditious coup to bring down Donald Trump, and much more. This is must reading for every American who wants to save our nation,” said Sean Hannity, #1 New York Times bestselling author of _Live Free or Die.
_
Peter F. Schweizer, New York Times bestselling author of _Clinton Cash_ says of Tom Fitton, “No one is more effective and fearless in fighting corruption in Washington, D.C., than Tom Fitton and Judicial Watch. If you care about the future of our country and want to make a difference, read _Clean House_. It’s time to put both Democrats and Republicans on notice.”

And the Washington Times says of _A Republic Under Assault_ , “A readable, engaging, persuasive account of what has gone wrong... Easily the most comprehensive tour of the ‘Chicago way’ we have seen to date.”
###
---
---

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: Early voting ends tomorrow!

body:

| Peter,

Early voting ends tomorrow.

All summer and fall, our team has worked hard to inform and empower Virginians about the new opportunities to vote early this year. We've done contactless canvassing, made phone calls, sent text messages, and visited early voting locations.

**[The hard work is paying off. Already, 250,000 VA-07 residents have cast their ballots early.](https://act.myngp.com/el/hlzRKLE6bQYz8ibTaIL1TvebHunPyNnh6k9cqOkR8MA=/H97YSoUk04u7rOodRWuIR8coV7_mTz1ojnSOPz3-KJU=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201030-1-EM&amount=25)**

But as early voting comes to a close, there's no time to rest.

My team has a plan to kick our voter outreach efforts into overdrive for this final stretch before Election Day. We can't let up our urgency in this get-out-the-vote weekend.

_**[Peter, could you contribute to our campaign today to help with this final push of voter outreach?](https://act.myngp.com/el/hlzRKLE6bQYz8ibTaIL1TvebHunPyNnh6k9cqOkR8MA=/H97YSoUk04u7rOodRWuIR8coV7_mTz1ojnSOPz3-KJU=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201030-1-EM&amount=25)**_

name: Minnesota House DFL
subject: Two visions for the future
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/rEvPNdWRvB2B5OxVlgv5DVfYXFdT8ofQV_h_-1ozHc8=/yeEoSCAMMGJAafJaQayThiIJ1YaFBssPaxZyaugDSUg=?refcode=103020PM)
| | Friend, Both Trump and Biden made final swings through Minnesota today. Our state, ranked as one of FiveThirtyEight's most likely tipping points in the presidential election, has a lot on the line. These respective visits today demonstrated two strikingly different visions for our future. Trump held an airport rally focused on division and hateful rhetoric. Biden held a social distanced event where he laid out his progressive vision for the future: affordable health care, a robust response to COVID-19, and making sure everyone is safe in their homes and their communities. We share Vice President Biden's vision. We believe that when we come together around our shared values, anything is possible. There are only 5 days left until election day. We can't afford a repeat of 2016. It's time for change. Together we can protect and expand our majority in the Minnesota House, flip the Minnesota Senate, and take back the White House - let's do it together. Thank you, Minnesota House DFL P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rEvPNdWRvB2B5OxVlgv5DVfYXFdT8ofQV_h_-1ozHc8=/yeEoSCAMMGJAafJaQayThiIJ1YaFBssPaxZyaugDSUg=?refcode=103020PM)

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: 60 minute COUNTDOWN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
