name: Team Durbin
subject: Hickenlooper needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Dick Durbin is working hard to defeat the GOP and elect a Democratic majority in the Senate -- but without a win in the Colorado Senate race on November 3, that job becomes much harder.
Colorado is one of our best shots to flip a red seat blue -- but it's up to us to make it happen.
**[Will you rush in a $5 donation to support John Hickenlooper in the closing days of this race?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201029-john-hickenlooper?refcode=em201029i_1086&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Right now, Republicans are flooding the airwaves in a desperate attempt to hold onto this seat.
We need to stand with John and make sure he has the resources to flip this seat in five days.
**[Pitch in $5 to help John Hickenlooper flip Colorado blue -- and take back the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201029-john-hickenlooper?refcode=em201029i_1086&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

| Patriot,
With Election Day right around the corner, our campaign is working overtime to help Kat Cammack defeat the far-left in Florida and take back the House!

body:

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2020
PHOTO RELEASE: NIKKI HALEY JOINS SENATOR LOEFFLER ON CAMPAIGN TRAIL AHEAD OF ELECTION DAY
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler was joined by Former Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley for two campaign rallies in Hall and Walton counties. The events, part of Senator Loeffler's All About Georgia Recess Tour, were attended by hundreds of energized supporters from across the state.

name: Luci Baines Johnson
subject: This is Luci Baines Johnson asking you to make sure your vote is cast so it can count.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

People have been voting in historic numbers this election. This is
important. In a democracy, our votes are our voice. Democracy is the work
of our people as we continue the march to a more perfect union.

This is Luci Baines Johnson asking you to make sure your vote is cast so
it can count. Today is the last day of early voting in Texas, so please
get to the polls today or make time to do so on Tuesday, November 3rd.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44001?t=1001&akid=111035%2E444211%2EPQpAMZ ]You can find your early voting location here.

I am appealing to the patriotism of all Americans. We are not powerless in
these difficult days. We have the right to vote. Americans have fought and
died to give us that power. We must exercise that right if that more
perfect union is ever to be ours. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?t=1002&akid=111035%2E444211%2EPQpAMZ ]Can you help turn out voters by
signing up for a phone bank today?

People are exhausted with the pain and sacrifice of COVID-19.

People are exhausted with injustice and violence.

People are exhausted with lack of leadership and a government that no
longer comes and reasons together.

People are exhausted with man’s inhumanity to their fellow man.

Under this administration countless families have suffered immeasurable
loss – loss of health, employment, education, justice, safety and even
life.

Their cause must be our cause too. When any of us suffer, all of us lose.

We are distressed with daily bombardments of discrimination towards people
of color, distressed with violent voices, distressed that neighbor is
being turned against neighbor. Distressed with the mindset that claims for
me to win you have to lose.

I have lived through turbulent times. But I have seen America meet the
challenge.

Together Americans have passed laws:
to help educate our people,
to provide health care for our neediest – the elderly and the poor,
to ensure the right to vote,
to access decent housing,
to provide decent education,
to make it a safer America for our people.

I watched my father sign:
the 1964 Civil Rights Act,
the 1965 Voting Rights Act,
the 1965 Immigration Act,
the Elementary, Secondary and Higher Education Act,
Medicare,
Medicaid.

I witnessed the progress we made. In recent years, I have seen that
progress diminished. I believe we can recommit our work for a more just
nation. I believe we must. We owe that to our children and grandchildren.

We must do all we can to turn out voters in Texas for this election if
we’re going to succeed in this work. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?t=1003&akid=111035%2E444211%2EPQpAMZ ]Please, sign up for a phone bank
in these final days of the Election.

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are committed to listening to America, to
trying and trying again until we complete the work of a more perfect
union. Hope is on the horizon.

On the 49th anniversary of Bloody Sunday, I held Civil Rights Leader
Congressman John Lewis’s left hand while Joe Biden held his right. We
walked across the Pettus Bridge together to commemorate the sacrifice made
in pursuit of that right. Alas this year we lost our hero John Lewis to
the scourge of cancer. But Joe Biden and I continue to walk together in
pursuit of John’s dream and ours for a more perfect union.

Please join hands with us in pursuit of that dream by reaching out to your
fellow voters and helping them make a plan to vote for Biden and Harris.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?t=1004&akid=111035%2E444211%2EPQpAMZ ]You can sign up for a phone bank shift here.

The work is not finished. But the opportunity is ours to win or lose.

With high hopes,

Luci Baines Johnson

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=111035%2E444211%2EPQpAMZ

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
Republicans win the ticket in MT Youth Election |
---
| | [ ](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=6596dc2508&e=a212bb87cc)
---
| |
# Landslide Wins for Republicans in MT Youth Election
The [Montana Secretary of State](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=e5d5545f02&e=a212bb87cc) released their youth election results yesterday with **strong wins for Republicans** up and down the ballot. This is good news for us on Tuesday. The 2016 Youth vote was a pretty close indicator in the final results of that election.

In the race for State Auditor, [Downing](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=da512f7635&e=a212bb87cc) beat his competitors in a 3-way race earning nearly 59% of the vote. This likely would have been closer to 70% in a 2-way.

President Trump won the election with nearly 64% and Senator Daines with 56%

**We need to make sure _ALL_ of the outstanding ballots are cast by Tuesday.** If you haven't already, please hand-deliver your ballot to your election office today. _Please encourage your friends and family to do the same._ Can you help with a small donation?
**Please donate >>> [Here](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=45c6fe7cea&e=a212bb87cc) <<<**
If you can, please help us out with a donation to boost our media and digital ads encouraging voters to deliver their ballots. It all helps and is appreciated.

Here's a story with the complete results of the Montana Youth Election: [The Sun Times](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=25eb342a89&e=a212bb87cc)

Thanks for your support! If you can, please consider a few more dollars to help us keep up our tempo in these final days.

Find your election drop off location here: [http://SOSMT.gov](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=17502d06f8&e=a212bb87cc)

name: Mark Warner
subject: Full court press
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This election is a team effort.
|
---

| | Dear Derek --

One of my favorite things about basketball is knowing you and your teammates are all in it together: that adrenaline rush from being down by one point, the motivation to keep the lead while you're ahead, and the effort by every single player that it takes to win.

That's how I've approached this election too. We've seen in Virginia that this is a team sport, and that success in the Senate race can boost down-ballot candidates in their own races, which is especially important in toss-up Congressional races. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9f2/53d9897e/55636bd6/1c88ca04/3335717405/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-oneshot?refcode=20201030_f_1_nd__927__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
**This full court press isn 't just for my campaign -- it's for all of us who are working to create a better Virginia and a better America.

[With just 4 days until Election Day, I need your help more than ever. Will you chip in to help this campaign and everyone on the team finish strong?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9f2/53d9897e/55636bd6/1c88ca03/3335717405/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-oneshot?refcode=20201030_f_1_nd__927__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We have momentum in our side in Virginia with over **_two million votes already cast_** in the Commonwealth, but that doesn't mean we can let up. We have one shot here to put our country back on the right course, and we need this to be a full court press until the end. We're working as hard as we can to reach voters in this final stretch to ensure that everyone has the chance to make their voice heard this year.

**[Whatever you can do to help us reach voters as the clock ticks down makes a difference.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9f2/53d9897e/55636bd6/1c88ca02/3335717405/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-oneshot?refcode=20201030_f_1_nd__927__&refcode2=ask22&amount=5")**

clean_body: This election is a team effort. | | | Dear Derek -- One of my favorite things about basketball is knowing you and your teammates are all in it together: that adrenaline rush from being down by one point, the motivation to keep the lead while you're ahead, and the effort by every single player that it takes to win. That's how I've approached this election too. We've seen in Virginia that this is a team sport, and that success in the Senate race can boost down-ballot candidates in their own races, which is especially important in toss-up Congressional races. | "" This full court press isn 't just for my campaign -- it's for all of us who are working to create a better Virginia and a better America. "" We have momentum in our side in Virginia with over two million votes already cast in the Commonwealth, but that doesn't mean we can let up. We have one shot here to put our country back on the right course, and we need this to be a full court press until the end. We're working as hard as we can to reach voters in this final stretch to ensure that everyone has the chance to make their voice heard this year. "" Thanks for your support -- let's go out and win this thing! "" Mark Warner "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Sylvester?=
subject: A great question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Larry Sylvester for School Board
body:
What are your thoughts on increasing the local teacher salary supplement for DCS teachers? | | | | [ ](https://larrysylvester.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=92bf0220b7c9b43b02ebf051f&id=3ec54faac8&e=a5c6b39366)
---
| | |
---
| Dr. Sylvester:
We are ready to vote this week! What are your thoughts on increasing the local teacher salary supplement for DCS teachers? \- Jason
Great question, Jason.
The undeniable truth is, our teachers deserve the compensation (and recognition) that reflects their responsibilities. This issue, in my opinion, is what has attributed to teacher shortages and salary gaps between us and other states.
I believe we can close the gap - between us and other states - and remain competitive by using local resources, while staying in budget. And I stand by that.
Full disclosure, we can’t raise our taxes to solve our problems. We must budget correctly.
One more thing. If hired to the job, I will leave no stone unturned. I know where our State Capital is and will see to it that our state legislature knows how important competitive salaries are to DeSoto County.
Again, thank you for the question and for voting - I wish more people voted.
Dr. Sylvester
P.S. Follow us on Facebook below.
---
|

clean_body: I hoped I could set the record straight... | Friend, I was just on Fox News defending President Trump against the mainstream media and big tech’s bias, censorship, and radical agenda. I know you're just as sick of the blatant lies they’re telling about our great President as I am, so I thought I could reach out to you for help right now. Election day is just days away, and I need your urgent support to keep our momentum going in Florida all the way until the last ballot is turned in on November 3rd. I’m not just running my own Congressional race, Friend - I’m running to help mobilize my Florida district to re-elect President Trump. With the Liberal powerhouses of the mainstream media and big tech working against us, the President is leaning on every district in the Sunshine State to do their part. I’m proud to be one of the allies he believes in to keep Florida red, but I can’t do this job alone. Securing our must-win state depends on all of us stepping up to the plate, and I hope we’ve helped inspire you to join our fight. Thank you, Rep. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Big Tech Censorship is Anti-American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
| |
---
Peter,
I hope you got a chance to see me on Tucker Carlson earlier this week, when I discussed the gross abuse of power Big Tech companies are continuing to display. **If you didn’t see it, click the image below to watch the clip!**
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=43088d54eebb4abdbf7e85bde6216629&_e=2HbUyjobHsUEMM5JzmoDPOwmVgj7A7po4eq22CodUVGsfqHcV3EIAvwtxBMvIRLgBHKtUDlKY1wzqTmi__5gfnWV-EmUOlcqYsTCNLqmGYOTnl9O7YXpIz7BDBBs-F8F5tlZALObTxSBYlmBcr1271-_6yEnGp2mkml4TnJ9YB66xbg1a3iheY0dysjRJpffU61m-ByfxkoisYnqmJGq3R5YjFl4sAr02KufTulrJ_H4_ZGxS-bZvzk4vywWjZFzfOHyCdtEerPoCR1sqGaDs_hC6AXu4Aad6p-Dj63AcmWugD5cXMhhkk90Kt8P_TDxuqJ5BPoTseK0cppAEpFkCUNFATlTcN1sDbYmIorZ_qmf9038SOjRp8NJ31dwHYbV2iflrK9cMEBBgGpzV86IEiSS8ZQyl08Ub-vMljdbSFo%3D)
|
---
This past week, Twitter’s CEO, Jack Dorsey, told Americans that we need to “trust the process” by which Twitter censors certain speech. This, while the Ayatollah of Iran is still tweeting about dropping bombs on Israel, and the Communist Party of China is regularly tweeting accounts of human rights abuses.

All of this is going on, and Twitter _**suspended**_ U.S. border patrol Commissioner Mark Morgan’s account for a post in which he touted the benefits of the wall on our southern border!

_**Who does Jack Dorsey think he’s kidding?**_

Removing “Pro-Trump” messages or policies from Twitter and banning the accounts of individuals who Tweet them is a clear violation of our constitutional right to free speech, and it directly impacts the fair electoral process in this country.

_**Please join me in fighting for free and fair elections today!**_
[**DONATE HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=43088d54eebb4abdbf7e85bde6216629&_e=2HbUyjobHsUEMM5JzmoDPOwmVgj7A7po4eq22CodUVGsfqHcV3EIAvwtxBMvIRLgBHKtUDlKY1wzqTmi__5gfnWV-EmUOlcqYsTCNLqmGYOTnl9O7YXpIz7BDBBs-F8F5tlZALObTxSBYlmBcr1271-_6yEnGp2mkml4TnJ9YB66xbg1a3iheY0dysjRJpffHhCJpWO_B29hMsjvpwhscsaqc9LbMK-CEXDG9IftfhcrADz85hLQQG4IwpSQVpPZrJ0pvQKb4SO7M8IZTAs9XCM2zl-eWlAzcgW1fK1IkNyS1Rv60k-EmJfa-gZaauQckmGwb5gALQkDxqg6exFAljuJvHdSrxgLXGeSATHYMPF7OBjPV6CdhpeZONa9FSjLEMdJhIeXlf1q1sBPqYACpmxHKdJ-aqYnHmrfRxuYNZw%3D)
**Liberals don’t care about this issue** , because they aren’t the ones being censored.

This is why it is crucial that we keep the Senate **RED** this November. Maintaining a Republican Senate Majority will allow us to hold Twitter and other big tech giants accountable for violating our First Amendment right to free speech.

**We must win this battle to win the war over our constitutional rights in this country — the last stand on earth.**
[_**Donate _HERE_ to Keep the Senate RED**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=43088d54eebb4abdbf7e85bde6216629&_e=2HbUyjobHsUEMM5JzmoDPOwmVgj7A7po4eq22CodUVGsfqHcV3EIAvwtxBMvIRLgBHKtUDlKY1wzqTmi__5gfnWV-EmUOlcqYsTCNLqmGYOTnl9O7YXpIz7BDBBs-F8F5tlZALObTxSBYlmBcr1271-_6yEnGp2mkml4TnJ9YB66xbg1a3iheY0dysjRJpffO9wxVizXzXzzMclKrc0Irk9ZFZU66hvfUp052-JpBgscQemGRE6aCpTkdHaL2EYdutkdNqBuOnVxe7EfHgiWVnP_jAIWCQgqruh279cqueB2N8tl1_4QPDsW5WeKwMX5fxgT9R3-wDZ5yNOb5CT4P653pVc_2OONbfYTr0sEVgD8emwYxFDzHqJ-F_BKc9YSNXKv8HXHSt-FqYn-7Ogu28y4ahwSrVF7QNM_PudmZAo%3D)
Sincerely,

Josh Hawley

clean_body: | | Peter, I hope you got a chance to see me on Tucker Carlson earlier this week, when I discussed the gross abuse of power Big Tech companies are continuing to display. If you didn’t see it, click the image below to watch the clip! | This past week, Twitter’s CEO, Jack Dorsey, told Americans that we need to “trust the process” by which Twitter censors certain speech. This, while the Ayatollah of Iran is still tweeting about dropping bombs on Israel, and the Communist Party of China is regularly tweeting accounts of human rights abuses. All of this is going on, and Twitter suspended U.S. border patrol Commissioner Mark Morgan’s account for a post in which he touted the benefits of the wall on our southern border! Who does Jack Dorsey think he’s kidding? Removing “Pro-Trump” messages or policies from Twitter and banning the accounts of individuals who Tweet them is a clear violation of our constitutional right to free speech, and it directly impacts the fair electoral process in this country. Please join me in fighting for free and fair elections today! Liberals don’t care about this issue , because they aren’t the ones being censored. This is why it is crucial that we keep the Senate RED this November. Maintaining a Republican Senate Majority will allow us to hold Twitter and other big tech giants accountable for violating our First Amendment right to free speech. We must win this battle to win the war over our constitutional rights in this country — the last stand on earth. Sincerely, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

| Friend,
As we enter the home stretch of the campaign, Kelly is finishing strong for a big victory next Tuesday - working around the clock to get out the vote and win on Election Day!
Kelly kicked off the week by making history - casting one of the deciding votes to [confirm](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmlrPx7k0PBGcu9V13u__g9QXHAOqHdRx-9rBuC1sxraZU6aI-E-M_6gyK07brGT3nDuJTSuukYbfN7YMOvltrpjW3IArNGRyzJBwK8ktBvTxdNK_H4eho3lLCQ2q33GJuDrnNzBTvB_0Yt5bETbsB4=&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) Justice Amy Coney Barrett to the U.S. Supreme Court. Justice Barrett is an unquestionably qualified jurist and staunch originalist, and Kelly was honored to be the first United States Senator to [support](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmlrPx7k0PBGdBr46s14zpVi3iA1D7Rphn0JNZD4-LA828QULabbO2hmjTIICoSKrzdCONJdGKoPwUhQujUL0KKqzUA_dDghbg1s_ofB-y9MhDy2bnVrafwi6gJL_SxnaOyidxftc-UdZtkCURrUhFieDxETgF2t_3oT8u0thzDNFfHLKk3gPgdZiBKdj26M7zA8gaUi26z5CBn4_qGCO7e2o8wIQxU-I7EmQ6u9nsuWESEgHZHho0so4zxxH33ziA==&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) her appointment to the bench. Thanks to President Trump's bold choice, we have solidified a strong conservative majority to preserve and protect the Constitution for generations to come.

| In the final days of this campaign, it is critical that undecided voters hear that Kelly Loeffler is the only true conservative Georgians can trust. She has a 100% [pro-Trump](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXr5_FvhASVmzb7OgbjmrVwZyrbFC4n-6pZFu1Eqvqdjmy0xRUn3odkRi9Wdql4I4Ol7kOJ6w3CzXDYRJEu1z-wXkZmKmOOlifjehBVeTChhKsnFLzOtrK8wPL2_vlCmomVOzaI2ika37zMkhfdpb7XX3L-hmSL2rmA==&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) voting record, has the [endorsement](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmP7cqJo8qJMxipVzX_8fNqMMi6-dboD1XzAkdefeglXWxQ3W1rdli0YS9TWg5jPj_O1acTS2DlgsSdCreSH2qzJ0lMhDgq3GvFnPmKBRBP9WAGQ4sAXxPRaBIOJW4tYNH1PEdhyfJdENlwp7fo4N1v8bAegjE6-BGY1HaXsyIuMG7cKdWQmGos=&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) of National Right to Life, and has been [rated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmlrPx7k0PBGwjTYa5g0X8QSy71ys_xCW255RHTbI6TB76yQOAnnNYyRbeKWYTvh35uZn98hIDHCOGzekOe4ma-pCUTkRP6nhmxKdTk6RK---GY-UZTs3wG0JUWXFTDwkNZ0R6DGxRCb&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) the Most Conservative Senator in America. As an "A" rated member of the NRA, she is the only candidate in her race, Republican or Democrat, who has never voted to water down the 2nd Amendment. She is [tough on China](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmlrPx7k0PBGfiDVExkp3XfCdpYgp5TPSCSgDvxi8A9G6QbhCBKVxMEYqba7vp8ShbUK_FKcbRnMJqs4pJOcYUkt3ThPViQEuT0LaRRVTrZOwH7makZhw0UksFf10bhHlPrX9NAWnS_yFfiXfTVymMsNDpObP-yh0kis3p5o-zDM4rdbRJO2iKWeb1kkVG_N8vDB3bH4zXqZ&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) and has joined President Trump to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for its role in spreading the virus. Kelly also has a long record of standing with law enforcement, including introducing [legislation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXnyGC7BLTE_PwkSK_V6sERiHx4BOdVpLpFIp_MLs4FArzwWdPXGZHpy2wjiUvhPacaSFOucBrycxrMugLNN76ts0p2Uh8UVm_3GOwp_binbsSpFC1_wGbsNDk6lQ26EfuINDd0OH7qAwdHalyKPafdzT4otAQO4gF-CEWY_BcIh_nTrIngUT10iMJrn5II5rm6QTL6u6W2_EaVFJ8xnXwDURRzs2OASpIn2JchYOEfrWJXN7Xn33N7k=&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) to defund cities that defund the police. She will also always [fight](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmlrPx7k0PBGY90Q40zKx5u9WwCdYwTnUXtNS2EWoPWK0sEgFLgrQV9m6b1hr8hiA4-mMiQD9HlcFJmIskc1aZrv8dySSjLlNMt6kvda6NPkDSnLdnJgkTNEppsr74PAYG7JDCMVyr9zC2A12GU-FlwWSKxvBZxbNwFJxXTI718LXoiTl1w9IUAKGSEYBfj06GJnf9-3pYalIXV8yDHqULc=&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) against Big Tech - and the liberal forces trying to silence conservatives across this nation.
This strong record is why she has the support of so many hardworking Georgians, [including](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmlrPx7k0PBG6PA99sr6d6c-h-Ybtl5D2NFrGcc6jPuk5qZPqlHj6XgECo4-pCxQ5h7jl3J3IZFPm7-BcWCzWbSMwutoIbIVjNUumiOGzhdsyUNYnPV8lh7C5dU3U0d2gL3GUpMfmcWbKrk9yW4ein6pIToIdn-9Jw==&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) Governor Kemp. Click the photos below to see what everyone is [saying](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVKpbzPs45JcURf-Sj5tS6C0vyD4EVUagSJOyI8KPDz2nzIWdVomXmlrPx7k0PBG2CSyJx50Ea-d-h7AdWpjSib0EtKaODGZ97jwe9F_RwYhpI-6Gy9YDRpifFRG3XouHDoebwONhHXsDlNfrIiHxwoTwFF_Eb180ddqmkBRW-cLBrIOnGeJ_WrsBWxgAH4r-2WJZ2FfuH5CW6OefKjhFw==&c=_EjcXA3UGJ3RHDRy3h3uXcU_33967gQddNZQO-sm5YZQrKcC1MFSUg==&ch=40E9zkpFtOOiZBnJ8U7n9NvNXjJHJBJ6aV1rDDS5ibuXKxUQEliiLQ==) about conservative Kelly Loeffler, and please share with your friends and family to spread the word about why we need Kelly fighting for Georgia in the Senate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Costello?=
subject: Our final, most critical deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,

This is it.

We've had monthly deadlines and quarterly deadlines, but now**we're up to our final deadline, Election Day!**

Our campaign has raised money neck and neck with Colin Allred over the last 16 months, but **we still need to raise over $20,000 more to fund our Election Day GOTV efforts.**

Door knocking, phone banking, poll greeting, and last minute TV buys [all need to be funded](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=2999b07048&e=68aaeb0998), and this is our last chance!
---
| | _FINAL CONTRIBUTION DEADLINE_

[DONATE NOW!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=a36f961739&e=68aaeb0998)
---
| [Contribute $2,800](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=b38eb4f873&e=68aaeb0998 "Contribute $2,800")
---
| [Contribute $1,000](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=069ba20887&e=68aaeb0998 "Contribute $1,000")
---
| [Contribute $500](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=12eb92e1c4&e=68aaeb0998 "Contribute $500")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=7d5de95cd0&e=68aaeb0998 "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute Other](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=374d2d59c7&e=68aaeb0998 "Contribute Other")
---
| We're up against an opponent who stands with Joe Biden's radical plan to destroy the Texas oil and gas industry.

He refuses to condemn those who would defund our police.

He wants to raise taxes that will kill already struggling North Texas businesses.

[We need your help to turn District 32 red again and elect Genevieve to Congress!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=8cd2a8b0d1&e=68aaeb0998)

Thank you for your support,
---
| Rob Costello

Campaign Manager
Genevieve Collins for Congress

| | You may have seen attack ads on your television attempting to smear Susie Lee’s work in Congress, and I wanted to take a moment to set the record straight. **[But first: Susie is facing her final end-of-month deadline before Election Day, and she needs our help to reach her goal. Can we count on you to rush in a donation and help defend this battleground district? →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xUZs1oNi8AKTdKRRPGZzuPm5bprDWgUJPujwEXHYmK8qlLkaff-zKco4XxVegJAgFEx9XEbEZyI1vjdBWqBOlekTkMq6pAokNOEf1QIlqLhy9eKaBSqQfXzjAPu1UAjvMdjUpr0BIkhB6Pf1At5p63MObc3lAKhC6ujLyJw-ZM0yp3MhnHn4XagZYLti0YInKZFrHM0EI3xTls8LVusjpLUtzdZUhcp7V6Q1ipKvO0lft8Po0vMYRApb5Ros16oaOItaNOUoxHbaJYzbHKHL7hot62oIpdQOE63AZhTaJ7YV3TmHrVyz1Q3VGrKjo-gIOJ7_qhvuVM2qyknWyxQ684gEXdh3K8gs9WmudiVyrZHyBfaH2oVSQPIxTon1s-DqA/36g/mi_RMfRCTZCm48QAboAZgw/h1/JVAgTMjKd3xRvLRaYcPL3JPNPXQ2neSi9Tctz0gMZGY)** | | | [Chip in: Re-Elect Susie Lee →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xUZs1oNi8AKTdKRRPGZzuPm5bprDWgUJPujwEXHYmK8qlLkaff-zKco4XxVegJAgFEx9XEbEZyI1vjdBWqBOlekTkMq6pAokNOEf1QIlqLh5NpWkneGqdUg4Rk_whh5M3n2UZwshqaRTHAdxS38AT3sZjGuF0rD0VKWG6Q38wcNP22-VRTLmufvnpRqF4ApImsEoB-nuQCBCg_Yv60JXIhT8tDYK33q3HC_7bK99-64lyhwKi44NDL522gFu-4KqnKmmoYaKqrKpHHsXZnQE87NJ_1sOGLZO3VzGvv8uJESFZWrDoXCrBV_rIKwZ1WKWOpT6yV2QYTzK9eKb3ig31hPVFrfqYeCYsWb8DjpFfXvV-HEadekojM9KyTYSkaG1c/36g/mi_RMfRCTZCm48QAboAZgw/h2/m1Di0ws8lqKGLIiuvCO86eQPwanvXm2TaeYiJTEtSAY)

Nevada thrives because of the talented workers in our hospitality, service, and entertainment industries -- but when we were faced with an unprecedented pandemic due to Donald Trump’s disastrous response to COVID-19, Nevada was one of the hardest hit economies in the country.
We are lucky to have a leader like Susie Lee in Washington, who immediately turned to her colleagues in Congress and advocated for our gaming industry.
Susie worked with Democrats, Republicans -- _anyone who would liste_ n -- to get emergency loans for more than 42,000 small businesses, unemployment benefits that helped families stay afloat, and focused on getting our country moving again.
**The truth is: Susie Lee is the type of fighter Nevada needs in Washington.**
She has always, and continues to, fight for her community. Now, I’m calling on this team to help Susie in this tough battle of a race she has in just a few days. National Republicans have spent more than $2.5 million attacking her, and your donation could make the difference in this competitive race. **[Can I count on you to chip in and help Susie reach her final end-of-month fundraising goal? →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xUZs1oNi8AKTdKRRPGZzuPm5bprDWgUJPujwEXHYmK8qlLkaff-zKco4XxVegJAgFEx9XEbEZyI1vjdBWqBOlekTkMq6pAokNOEf1QIlqLh-mupYIctqRxqlDYmAo7AQzmAVyhf56fvS_NYJ43cxZcZG8gO-fX1vKBJXbnvgh8h9HKtrORWCkRo3mSPKDdbRJ1EWNJLwvnvJO4SZffIwz5WzcmhAbNHa0tzXgnWkMiTjGlLkTIMtcGlO1ByFqR74tysEVons8rAfw9ISXSyRU7_mzktrguRe7myF1PgO5mdsnUfeNa5-Vccyfe914tnTD290jbpUM2qLGRpWZ0b8U_Tj8S98MqB68DojO6wJwtbnZQHKes17-9m1EsTC5uYdI/36g/mi_RMfRCTZCm48QAboAZgw/h3/p4UnpRxaUvc0F9Opirn4zoaTRNp1kE4Ccs_idqlBxR8)**

clean_body: | | | | | You may have seen attack ads on your television attempting to smear Susie Lee’s work in Congress, and I wanted to take a moment to set the record straight. | | | Nevada thrives because of the talented workers in our hospitality, service, and entertainment industries -- but when we were faced with an unprecedented pandemic due to Donald Trump’s disastrous response to COVID-19, Nevada was one of the hardest hit economies in the country. We are lucky to have a leader like Susie Lee in Washington, who immediately turned to her colleagues in Congress and advocated for our gaming industry. Susie worked with Democrats, Republicans -- anyone who would liste n -- to get emergency loans for more than 42,000 small businesses, unemployment benefits that helped families stay afloat, and focused on getting our country moving again. The truth is: Susie Lee is the type of fighter Nevada needs in Washington. She has always, and continues to, fight for her community. Now, I’m calling on this team to help Susie in this tough battle of a race she has in just a few days. National Republicans have spent more than $2.5 million attacking her, and your donation could make the difference in this competitive race. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your help, Steve | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Get Out the Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
In just a matter of just days, our district will be getting out and voting in the most consequential election we have seen to date. Socialst Susan, Peter, In just a matter of just days, our district will be getting out and voting in the most consequential election we have seen to date.
Socialst Susan, her DC boss Nancy Pelosi, and the radical and Far-Left Democrats believe they truly have a chance at winning the presidency, flipping the Senate, and adding even MORE seats to their ‘Squad,’ but they must be stopped.
Peter, we’re calling out voters from all across the Lehigh Valley to ensure they have done their civic duty and have gotten out the vote. [**Get Out The Vote**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=29a5c07c7d0743cf9513359149999fda&_e=z2zMTCVH1W_DJ04scRITdxxrp9NNMSvyYhlOEseec68KUw3lY0uNXk4kE47QmweGl84WNwu4K3cgxpDPsUeTXqlhxCqnuY_1qGf-Jtbij1vhFO-jc68guY4RZLJWOSRB0hglWx_51T6IakH_2KYZqRlVy5K-VrJB1iIBemPlAXmZeKLj9zytyoBS1CgMzQnlkDHhXJ2P6Pkag-zY3SbLn99fpLuQfijihdXqx9ooUhPGzi91bvAojSr5GqUX_mvh) As we enter the final days of this race, we need to rally around our conservative values, and vote to defend our freedoms and rights as Americans. [**Can I count You In?**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=29a5c07c7d0743cf9513359149999fda&_e=z2zMTCVH1W_DJ04scRITdxxrp9NNMSvyYhlOEseec68E-XD0wBESXs7YK1wWSE9CurY-ZNWKToICP6rOVTW25hq_7wKdMONBcyvsSziqRLo1kHHY_dDHLXCzZjb0UOwpqDuU6oaDERKon1QTlzueWLT5EGpA31knaAsPY5-AXkFb2UsYh7Zf1TG3lxkaUVZiYDjKrJtZsplBqwqaBwhjegg2oGbKqdGtXf-ZAldjX0qVWpHbPPX6dp0tgAbi30DX) We’ve seen what the Far-Left is capable of and we also know that they’re not intending to throttle back their agenda any time soon.
They must be stopped, and we need your help in doing so. Will you join me on Tuesday to ensure WE get out the vote?
We have to do everything we can in these final days to flip PA-07 RED.
There are no second chances. No do-overs. No try agains. This is it.
Can I count you in? Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=29a5c07c7d0743cf9513359149999fda&_t=bhNO2hvTuSLIno-Z5Q3hL3ZZMh4A7FdeKNb9BIe_DzK0P4soorZ60Puaftr_lPQ_yivA63H7OyyaMLMRWRRNlZCUY3LyTPFu6LwowRVKYLyqbc0EsX33J_JKk6mccCtNZaeyzoDAzxBiYMhNEHw0ki43aIx0zOTdWc9EpWv3J2Q%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
The Economy’s Post-Lockdown Comeback; Why Trump's Health Care Price Transparency Rules Will Reignite America's Economy; America First Foreign Policy.. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ca86f2dce&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**The Economy’s Post-Lockdown Comeback**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78cc7da4a6&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Wall Street Journal_
“The U.S. economy grew at a record 33.1% in the third quarter, even after most government transfer payments expired. When politicians lift their lockdowns, and Americans can get on with their prudently cautious lives even in a pandemic, people work, business invests and the economy grows,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| [**Why Trump's Health Care Price Transparency Rules Will Reignite America's Economy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f4c2d01cf1&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“In a historic win for all Americans on Thursday, President Trump issued a final rule requiring health insurers to post the prices they have negotiated with hospitals, medical facilities, and doctors. Under this rule, health care consumers, including employers sponsoring workplace coverage, can finally know prices before they receive care,” economist and former Reagan adviser Art Laffer writes.
---
|
---
| [**I'm the FDA Point Person on COVID-19 Vaccines. We'll Make Sure They're Safe and Effective.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a1877cf37&e=3ee4985eea)
_-USA Today_
“With high uptake, COVID-19 vaccines have the potential to save many lives in the United States,” Dr. Peter Marks of the FDA writes. “Therefore, it is critical to be open and transparent about the process that the [FDA] will follow to help make safe and effective COVID-19 vaccines available . . . We pledge to do our duty to the best of our ability, independently and without conflicts of interest.”
---
|
---
| [**Secretary of State Pompeo: America First Foreign Policy Is Succeeding**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=758ded8f2b&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“An America First foreign policy puts our national interests first, which starts with seeing the world as it is, not as we wish it were,” Secretary of State Mike Pompeo writes. “Seeing the world with clear eyes also means recognizing without hesitation who our friends are. America has no greater friend than Israel.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Is the Greatest President in the Modern Era When It Comes to Shaping the Judiciary**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a839d00486&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Washington Post_
“With the Senate’s confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court, President Trump has cemented his legacy as the most important president in the modern era when it comes to shaping the judiciary,” Marc Thiessen of the American Enterprise Institute writes. “Trump has made better judicial choices than any modern Republican president.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8fba744c3d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5146ab68d8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cd3905c2df)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: New guidance pt. 1
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Our case numbers, unfortunately, aren't getting better. Today, we can turn this trend around and bring our cases and hospitalizations back to where they were a few weeks ago. If we all put on a mask, cancel social events, and keep our distance, we'll save hundreds of lives. Today, I'm announcing the first round of changes we're making to our guidance. Over the next few days, I'll be talking with the other governors in the region, and I anticipate making additional announcements next Thursday.
We've spent the past few days looking extensively at the case data and analyzing every option available to us. Throughout that process, we've been guided by three principles:
1. Make targeted interventions where it matters. It's critical that the steps we take are grounded in the science and data and that we have confidence they will be effective.
2. Protect jobs. Any new restrictions have potential impacts on the economy. It's important to us that we are limiting economic impacts as much as possible while maximizing the public health impacts of our decision.
3. Protect education. We know that schools are not significant spreaders of COVID, and we also know how important it is that kids have the opportunity for in-person learning. Structured environments help prevent spread. Sending more kids home to learn virtually would just take kids out of structured environments and into unstructured environments, leading to more spread and more cases. So, we made sure our interventions would not threaten kids' ability to get the best possible education.
Here's the changes we're making:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UaI5J_9l6H66KAJXm1NfD-txc-zVE1UPVo5F595O8Gzr3fsK4fLODUT3_BAULEvXvvuG7p3ZQE57xoMHvRx63qFseycsm1KptWYA-gmjheV_pb3a6dkWVOQ-uPxPlqeN8MF7Y64o2AfK9PnGJCt0FbX4L1WYcOfybxt8QQDrf8cNzY5W6zL9RibWWktZn_qNJ5ONJONA8Lc=&c=eGShJwoeZxbTzQcL8z0mDBk2R8wpuXMCvE2vguoj2s-JgvER9Lphzg==&ch=QXW6FhHqjtHvC5iN-xAoECMonOES-d9w3oSap2fRm8B6PCRyVd23XQ==)
---
| Social Gatherings: Effective immediately, we're reducing the social gathering limit from 15 to 10. This needs to be a stable, consistent group. Write down the names of the people you're going to see socially. And even with those people, we have to wear a mask.
This is the limit for informal, unstructured, social gatherings. What's not a social gathering? Offices, buses, schools, and other controlled settings with assigned seating and other public health measures in place. We know that spread is happening in these casual, social settings and is not happening in larger but more structured environments.
To anyone who does have big parties, we'll shut you down, and we'll fine you up to $500 for every person there. It's not worth it. For the next few weeks, let's avoid social events and only see the people that we need to see.
---
|
---
| Sports: Another area where we're letting our guard down and getting too close is at sporting events. Effective immediately, we can no longer allow spectators at sporting events. The only exception is for players 10 and younger, who can have one parent or guardian with them while they play.
We're also seeing spread at indoor sports facilities, like ice rinks and indoor soccer stadiums. So, effective on Monday, we'll be closing all ice rinks and indoor sports facilities for one week. This will allow us to work with the facilities and develop new guidance around masking, testing, contact tracing, and other health protocols.
Houses of Worship: Another area where we're seeing spread is in houses of worship. If any faith leaders are no longer offering virtual services, we're asking them to bring that back, and proactively encourage your congregants to use that option for the next few weeks. I want to be able to hold in-person services over the holidays, but that will be dangerous unless we make a real commitment to worshipping virtually for the next few weeks.
Visitation: Our increase in hospitalizations is driven by 60, 70, and 80-year olds. For that reason, we'll be working with our nursing homes and hospitals over the next few days to scale back on visitation. Except for certain circumstances, we want people to refrain from visiting your loved ones for just a couple of weeks. I know this is painful, and I know how much our older relatives rely on these visits. But if we don't do this now, we'll have no choice but to do it for a much longer period in a few weeks, and in that time, we'll have lost more Rhode Islanders to this virus.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UaI5J_9l6H66KAJXm1NfD-txc-zVE1UPVo5F595O8Gzr3fsK4fLODe06yJQ7G_UboB9nhxIWMU0b3EA-kvIfdor3fh1gWYhNAitzpAynJHCXFIEPBtrh_s6tcL8Ob9m4mrg6HsnZE9Us-axHp2DvOTIqmBnimsLQ3AikD9vJY6yUsm_i1dyjnQsdqJVy3l4q_D4kpTQaM4M=&c=eGShJwoeZxbTzQcL8z0mDBk2R8wpuXMCvE2vguoj2s-JgvER9Lphzg==&ch=QXW6FhHqjtHvC5iN-xAoECMonOES-d9w3oSap2fRm8B6PCRyVd23XQ==)
---
| The situation we're in isn't unique--all over the country, the numbers are spiking. Just yesterday, eight states set single-day records in the numbers of cases. What is unique to Rhode Island is our spirit and our resilience. It's been eight months. We're tired. We're all trying hard, and we don't have much left in the tank. This morning I was on the radio, and I heard from different callers - business owners, nurses, people with family in nursing homes. Everyone's struggling right now. Thousands are out of work. We need to pull together to lift everyone back up. We're a single team - a team of one million people - with a single mission: stop the second wave. We can do this.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UaI5J_9l6H66KAJXm1NfD-txc-zVE1UPVo5F595O8Gzr3fsK4fLODe06yJQ7G_Ub2gw6qmVwKuo7YVTSyWgzqddP9RqwGZBPzkB4h3bGcOlVo0zzLDpQ8TToUyn15JvIEQlKgdIBYM3wXXuQAJuONJJfDazYxnMJ8ONZ-Ty6hfk7gB1KO4Y-W5flB0PDvATVufR1hYacJQMDz63W8mRQY8bmBUE64w_61PJo5-zxY5DC74LOA-pBpFr5eSKdUdLLiEAAOArSSu63Rr_a00cbMtc836kkTNWr6yBbVS07DWXJxhWcStJHLEqZAPajaL3uIPczQ_JUIU4=&c=eGShJwoeZxbTzQcL8z0mDBk2R8wpuXMCvE2vguoj2s-JgvER9Lphzg==&ch=QXW6FhHqjtHvC5iN-xAoECMonOES-d9w3oSap2fRm8B6PCRyVd23XQ==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=f5f35cb1-9867-45db-ab84-f37adbb57699)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=f5f35cb1-9867-45db-ab84-f37adbb57699) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: Roy Cooper 2020
subject: Republicans are "catching up"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120090f/2fde7c66/4f5bce46/156e8982/4161461105/VEsH/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-email-logo?refcode=logo")

| | | Peter, we're only four days out from the election, and things are getting close.

North Carolina has seen _record breaking_ early voter turnout, with over 86% percent of all the votes cast in 2016!

But while Democrats started off strong, a new report from _The News & Observer_ found that Republicans are "catching up" to our lead!

[With so little time remaining, we can't afford for Dan Forest's team to outpace us. The 2016 race was incredibly close, and all signs are pointing to similar outcomes this year - we can't take a single vote for granted. ](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120090f/2fde7c66/4f5bce46/156e8985/4161461105/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B2_103020_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

[That's why hitting our $400,000 Path to Progress goal is so important, Peter. A huge chunk of registered voters still haven't cast ballots yet, and we need to mobilize and persuade them to turn out for Roy. Can we count on you to make a contribution of $10 to help us do that?](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120090f/2fde7c66/4f5bce46/156e8985/4161461105/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B2_103020_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

**[CHIP IN NOW >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120090f/2fde7c66/4f5bce46/156e8984/4161461105/VEsC/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B2_103020_REAC_ALL&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

[The far right is doing everything they can to swing this election and flip North Carolina red. ](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120090f/2fde7c66/4f5bce46/156e8985/4161461105/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B2_103020_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We're asking you directly: Can you pitch in $10 to get us across the finish line? Help make sure we hit our $400,000 Path to Progress goal and re-elect Roy! Anything you give makes a huge difference. ](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120090f/2fde7c66/4f5bce46/156e8985/4161461105/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B2_103020_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| In just a few days, Iowans will go to the polls and decide who will represent us in Congress, and I’m writing you to give my full support to my friend, Senator Randy Feenstra.
---
| [Chip in $5!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=818dae407c&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Chip in $5!")
---
| In the Iowa Senate, Randy showed up, got the job done, and earned the respect of his colleagues. He has the experience, expertise, and values that make him an ideal representative - that’s why we made him the chairman of the Ways and Means Committee, where we were able to deliver real results for Iowa like passing the largest income tax reduction in state history.

I have complete faith that Randy will do the same in Washington – earn the respect of his colleagues, work across the aisle, and deliver for Iowa and America.

In these last few days, consider helping Randy reach undecided voters and push back against the millions of dollars that have flooded into Iowa from liberal activists by chipping in $5 or $10 to his campaign – and make sure to get out and vote on November 3rd!
---
| [Click here!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=efdeb28a34&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here!")
---
| Sincerely,
Senator Jack Whitver
_Iowa Senate Majority Leader_

I’ve set a MASSIVE goal of making this our STRONGEST month EVER. Not crushing our goal is NOT an option. I really need you to contribute, which is why I’m going to do something I’ve never done before in the hopes that you’ll join me in making history... For the NEXT HOUR, all contributions made to our FINAL End-of-Month Goal will make not 800, or 900, but 1000% MORE of an IMPACT! Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to our End-of-Month Goal and to increase your impact by 1000%. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 = $220 CONTRIBUTE $15 = $165 CONTRIBUTE $10 = $110 CONTRIBUTE $5 = $55 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT I need to know that I can count on you right now. The Trump Finance Team is sending me a list of EVERY Patriot who contributes to this email. Make sure I see your name. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to increase your impact by 1000% and to get on the list I see next. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States CONTRIBUTE $5 = $55 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
Today I’m writing to you from on the road. Governor Holcomb and I are up in Northern Indiana, talking with Hoosiers about the big issues in this | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0c0a0ca58f)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Thankful_**
Today I’m writing to you from on the road. **Governor Holcomb** and I are up in Northern Indiana, talking with Hoosiers about the big issues in this election.

As we all go to vote (I voted yesterday), there’s a lot on the line, and we all know that it’s critical that we do everything we can in these final days to elect Republicans up and down the ballot and keep Indiana moving forward.

And with just four days to go until Election Day, I’m thankful for each of you who have helped your Indiana Republican Party this year. There’s no doubt that this has been another unusual election (and for that matter, an unusual year), but, as **Governor Holcomb** says, Hoosiers have come together. Whether you’ve been out putting in yard signs, making calls, or talking with your friends, family and neighbors, your contributions are making the difference to make sure that Indiana keeps moving forward – and doesn’t move back to the Democrat days of debt and dysfunction.

And we can’t let up the gas now. Over the next four days, I’ll be talking to everyone I can to support our entire Republican team.

Will you join me? Make sure you’ve made a plan to vote, and then let’s finish this election strong...together!

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:** _**Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer **was on the road today with Governor Holcomb. They stopped at the Cone Palace in Kokomo and met with **Paul Wyman (Howard Co. Commissioner)****, Jennifer Jack (Howard Co. GOP Chair) and State Rep. Mike Karickhoff **._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
---
| **_Building One Indiana for All_** It's been another busy week for **Governor Holcomb**!

On Tuesday he took part in the [final gubernatorial debate](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=104319e4ed&e=1acd9bb3d6) (which he won!), where once again he clearly outlined his plan for the next four years as he continues building One Indiana for All.

He spoke about building a record-breaking economy, bringing huge numbers of jobs to our state, making sure Hoosiers are skilled-up and ready to fill new jobs, how important access to broadband is for our rural communities, how the hardworking men and women at DCS are making a difference in the lives of Hoosier families, and how his pro-life leadership has protected the most vulnerable Hoosiers. We’re facing a crucial choice in a few days, and it’s never been more important to stay on top of the key issues. If you missed the [debate](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c8d3e82c6e&e=1acd9bb3d6) watch a replay [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4e339c390a&e=1acd9bb3d6).

This week, **Governor Holcomb** also fulfilled a key promise of his Next Level Agenda. On Wednesday, he announced construction will begin on the state’s largest public transit investment in Indiana history – expanding commuter rail service from the West Lake Corridor to Chicago. This transformational project will boost economic development in Northwest Indiana and create new opportunities for Hoosiers! **_“By bringing commuter rail through the heart of Lake County, the West Lake Corridor project is a game changer for northwest Indiana and the entire state." -Governor Holcomb_** Governor Holcomb then yesterday joined local officials and executives from Midwest Truck to officially break ground on the company's new facility in Merrillville! In September, the company announced its intentions to expand its Midwest operations in Merrillville with plans to create new jobs for Hoosiers! Under Gov. Holcomb's leadership, Indiana is continuing to attract investment and jobs, even during a pandemic. _**"It’s an exciting day as we celebrate Midwest Truck’s decision to fuel its growth in Indiana, and I’m so grateful for the company's commitment to increasing its footprint and creating quality career opportunities in northwest Indiana.”**_ To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=abbb6a66d6&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a43c8f3d63&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=34205cd514&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Four Days: Go Vote!**_ Early voting is now available statewide, and Election Day is this Tuesday. More than a million Hoosiers have already cast statewide, and we need to make sure you vote, too! Our Republican team up and down the ballot needs your vote, so consider getting out this weekend to vote. And if you can’t vote then, make sure you vote on Tuesday. Polls are open statewide from 6 a.m. – 6 p.m. local time. **Find your local early vote locations and hours: **
******[2020 Election Information Center](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=63b0dd3226&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a41b030ca&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e366053171&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=37fa51fd6c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Final Ads: Watch & Share**_ Hoosiers, we're only a few days away from this critical election and we wanted to share **Governor Holcomb** , **Victoria Spartz** &** Todd Rokita's** final campaign ads.

Over the past four years, **Governor Holcomb** and **First Lady Janet Holcomb** have had the honor of serving Hoosiers across the state. Together we can help **Governor Holcomb** continue building One Indiana for All! Watch the full ad [here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=60724e797f&e=1acd9bb3d6) [\--> Watch Governor Holcomb's final campaign ad here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8e8a201fbf&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Through all of her life experiences, **Victoria Spartz** has become a role model for her daughters. Victoria came to America with nothing, found success and is stepping up to make Indiana and the nation a better place. Watch the full ad [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9219cda73c&e=1acd9bb3d6).
[\--> Watch Victoria Spartz's final campaign ad here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a186bf8dad&e=1acd9bb3d6)
As our state's Attorney General,**Todd Rokita** will always protect the healthcare rights of Hoosiers and stand up for Indiana's most vulnerable. As the father of a special needs child, Todd understands the need for affordable healthcare. Watch the full ad [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b9c6cec5d&e=1acd9bb3d6).
[\--> Watch Todd Rokita's final campaign ad here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d08ba9877&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Make sure to share these ads with your family and friends. We're almost across the finish line, but our Republican team still needs your help!
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| _**Todd Rokita On the Road**_ Our attorney general nominee Todd Rokita has been hard at work this past week traveling around Indiana and meeting with voters. He's talked with voters in Indianapolis, Crawfordsville, and Dubois County Right to Life leaders.

Rokita has pledged to faithfully visit every county each year to obtain marching orders from Hoosiers and hear from the citizens of Indiana. Vote Todd Rokita for your Attorney General on November 3rd. [\--> Click here to follow Todd Rokita on Facebook <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e4616fa2fa&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[\--> Click here to follow Todd Rokita on Twitter <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=20726eb459&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=217674b631&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Congratulations, Justice Amy Coney Barrett!**_ It’s official! Indiana’s own Amy Coney Barrett is now officially U.S. Supreme Court Associate Justice Amy Coney Barrett! She was officially confirmed on Monday and sworn in at the White House that evening.

Congratulations, ACB – we can’t wait to see your work on the bench!

|

[November 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=621540e8b6&e=1acd9bb3d6): IFRW Women's Suffrage Centennial Tea Celebration

clean_body: Today I’m writing to you from on the road. Governor Holcomb and I are up in Northern Indiana, talking with Hoosiers about the big issues in this | | | | | | | | Thankful Today I’m writing to you from on the road. Governor Holcomb and I are up in Northern Indiana, talking with Hoosiers about the big issues in this election. As we all go to vote (I voted yesterday), there’s a lot on the line, and we all know that it’s critical that we do everything we can in these final days to elect Republicans up and down the ballot and keep Indiana moving forward. And with just four days to go until Election Day, I’m thankful for each of you who have helped your Indiana Republican Party this year. There’s no doubt that this has been another unusual election (and for that matter, an unusual year), but, as Governor Holcomb says, Hoosiers have come together. Whether you’ve been out putting in yard signs, making calls, or talking with your friends, family and neighbors, your contributions are making the difference to make sure that Indiana keeps moving forward – and doesn’t move back to the Democrat days of debt and dysfunction. And we can’t let up the gas now. Over the next four days, I’ll be talking to everyone I can to support our entire Republican team. Will you join me? Make sure you’ve made a plan to vote, and then let’s finish this election strong...together! -Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO: Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer was on the road today with Governor Holcomb. They stopped at the Cone Palace in Kokomo and met with Paul Wyman (Howard Co. Commissioner), Jennifer Jack (Howard Co. GOP Chair) and State Rep. Mike Karickhoff . | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building One Indiana for All It's been another busy week for Governor Holcomb! On Tuesday he took part in the (which he won!), where once again he clearly outlined his plan for the next four years as he continues building One Indiana for All. He spoke about building a record-breaking economy, bringing huge numbers of jobs to our state, making sure Hoosiers are skilled-up and ready to fill new jobs, how important access to broadband is for our rural communities, how the hardworking men and women at DCS are making a difference in the lives of Hoosier families, and how his pro-life leadership has protected the most vulnerable Hoosiers. We’re facing a crucial choice in a few days, and it’s never been more important to stay on top of the key issues. If you missed the watch a replay . This week, Governor Holcomb also fulfilled a key promise of his Next Level Agenda. On Wednesday, he announced construction will begin on the state’s largest public transit investment in Indiana history – expanding commuter rail service from the West Lake Corridor to Chicago. This transformational project will boost economic development in Northwest Indiana and create new opportunities for Hoosiers! “By bringing commuter rail through the heart of Lake County, the West Lake Corridor project is a game changer for northwest Indiana and the entire state." -Governor Holcomb Governor Holcomb then yesterday joined local officials and executives from Midwest Truck to officially break ground on the company's new facility in Merrillville! In September, the company announced its intentions to expand its Midwest operations in Merrillville with plans to create new jobs for Hoosiers! Under Gov. Holcomb's leadership, Indiana is continuing to attract investment and jobs, even during a pandemic. "It’s an exciting day as we celebrate Midwest Truck’s decision to fuel its growth in Indiana, and I’m so grateful for the company's commitment to increasing its footprint and creating quality career opportunities in northwest Indiana.” To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , and ! | | | Four Days: Go Vote! Early voting is now available statewide, and Election Day is this Tuesday. More than a million Hoosiers have already cast statewide, and we need to make sure you vote, too! Our Republican team up and down the ballot needs your vote, so consider getting out this weekend to vote. And if you can’t vote then, make sure you vote on Tuesday. Polls are open statewide from 6 a.m. – 6 p.m. local time. Find your local early vote locations and hours: **** | | | | | | Final Ads: Watch & Share Hoosiers, we're only a few days away from this critical election and we wanted to share Governor Holcomb , Victoria Spartz & Todd Rokita's final campaign ads. Over the past four years, Governor Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb have had the honor of serving Hoosiers across the state. Together we can help Governor Holcomb continue building One Indiana for All! Watch the full ad Through all of her life experiences, Victoria Spartz has become a role model for her daughters. Victoria came to America with nothing, found success and is stepping up to make Indiana and the nation a better place. Watch the full ad . As our state's Attorney General,Todd Rokita will always protect the healthcare rights of Hoosiers and stand up for Indiana's most vulnerable. As the father of a special needs child, Todd understands the need for affordable healthcare. Watch the full ad . Make sure to share these ads with your family and friends. We're almost across the finish line, but our Republican team still needs your help! | | | | Todd Rokita On the Road Our attorney general nominee Todd Rokita has been hard at work this past week traveling around Indiana and meeting with voters. He's talked with voters in Indianapolis, Crawfordsville, and Dubois County Right to Life leaders. Rokita has pledged to faithfully visit every county each year to obtain marching orders from Hoosiers and hear from the citizens of Indiana. Vote Todd Rokita for your Attorney General on November 3rd. | | | Congratulations, Justice Amy Coney Barrett! It’s official! Indiana’s own Amy Coney Barrett is now officially U.S. Supreme Court Associate Justice Amy Coney Barrett! She was officially confirmed on Monday and sworn in at the White House that evening. Congratulations, ACB – we can’t wait to see your work on the bench! | | Upcoming Events : IFRW Women's Suffrage Centennial Tea Celebration Have an event to add?
